Evaluations on the LiveCodeBench v6 dataset (post-March 2025) demonstrate that DryRUN matches performance against CodeSIM, a state-of-the-art and public-test-dependent framework, while operating entirely without public test cases or external execution feedback while reducing output token consumption.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DryRUN框架，让大语言模型自主生成测试输入并模拟执行轨迹来实现代码自修正，无需依赖人工提供的公开测试用例，在LiveCodeBench v6上达到与依赖公开测试的SOTA方法CodeSIM相当的性能，同时降低了token消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有基于仿真的代码生成方法依赖人工提供的公开测试用例来驱动调试循环，而人工编写测试用例是软件开发中的瓶颈；且真实场景中ground-truth的输入输出示例在实现前几乎不可用，导致这些方法局限于竞赛编程数据集。此外，依赖公开测试还会导致"过度自信差距"，使框架过拟合简单示例。
AI.method: 提出DryRUN框架，让LLM自主生成有效输入并模拟执行轨迹进行自修正，无需ground-truth样本。框架通过迭代规划、自主生成输入和模拟执行来缓解算法过度自信。
AI.result: 在LiveCodeBench v6数据集（2025年3月后）上，DryRUN在不依赖公开测试用例和外部执行反馈的条件下，达到了与依赖公开测试的SOTA方法CodeSIM相当的性能，同时减少了输出token消耗。
AI.conclusion: 外部样本输入并非代码生成的必要条件，LLM可自主生成输入并通过模拟执行轨迹实现自我修正，打破了对人工测试用例的依赖瓶颈。

title: Materialistic RIR: Material Conditioned Realistic RIR Generation
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Findings. Project page: https://mahnoor-fatima-saad.github.io/MatRIR.html
summary: Rings like gold, thuds like wood! The sound we hear in a scene is shaped not only by the spatial layout of the environment but also by the materials of the objects and surfaces within it. For instance, a room with wooden walls will produce a different acoustic experience from a room with the same spatial layout but concrete walls. Accurately modeling these effects is essential for applications such as virtual reality, robotics, architectural design, and audio engineering. Yet, existing methods for acoustic modeling often entangle spatial and material influences in correlated representations, which limits user control and reduces the realism of the generated acoustics. In this work, we present a novel approach for material-controlled Room Impulse Response (RIR) generation that explicitly disentangles the effects of spatial and material cues in a scene. Our approach models the RIR using two modules: a spatial module that captures the influence of the spatial layout of the scene, and a material module that modulates this spatial RIR according to a user-specified material configuration. This explicitly disentangled design allows users to easily modify the material configuration of a scene and observe its impact on acoustics without altering the spatial structure or scene content. Our model provides significant improvements over prior approaches on both acoustic-based metrics (up to +16% on RTE) and material-based metrics (up to +70%). Furthermore, through a human perceptual study, we demonstrate the improved realism and material sensitivity of our model compared to the strongest baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种显式解耦空间与材料影响的房间脉冲响应（RIR）生成方法，通过空间模块和材料模块分别建模场景布局与材料配置对声学的影响，支持用户独立控制材料属性而不改变空间结构，在声学指标（RTE提升16%）和材料指标（提升70%）上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有声学建模方法常将空间布局与材料影响纠缠在关联表示中，限制了用户对材料属性的独立控制，降低了生成声学的真实感。
AI.method: 提出双模块解耦架构：空间模块捕获场景布局对RIR的影响；材料模块根据用户指定的材料配置对空间RIR进行调制，实现空间与材料的显式解耦。
AI.result: 声学指标上RTE提升最高16%，材料指标提升最高70%；人类感知实验表明模型在真实感和材料敏感性上均优于最强基线。
AI.conclusion: 显式解耦空间与材料的设计有效提升了RIR生成的可控性和真实感，为虚拟现实、机器人、建筑设计等应用提供了更灵活的声学建模方案。

title: Caesar: Deep Agentic Web Exploration for Creative Answer Synthesis
summary: To advance from passive retrieval to creative discovery of new ideas, autonomous agents must be capable of deep, associative synthesis. However, current agentic frameworks prioritize convergent search, often resulting in derivative summaries that lack creativity. Caesar is an agentic LLM architecture designed to bridge the gap between information gathering and synthesis of new insights. Unlike existing agents that treat the web as a flat sequence of disconnected documents, Caesar leverages an extensive knowledge graph to foster associative reasoning, thus enabling the discovery of non-obvious connections between disparate concepts. It consists of two components: (1) exploration driven by a dynamic context-aware policy, and (2) synthesis controlled by an adversarial draft refinement loop that actively seeks novel perspectives rather than confirming established priors. Caesar demonstrates the ability to generate artifacts and answers characterized by high novelty and structural coherence, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art LLM research agents in tasks requiring creativity.

AI.tldr: Caesar是一个基于智能体LLM的架构，通过知识图谱驱动的关联推理和对抗性草稿优化，实现从被动检索到创造性发现的跨越，在需要创造力的任务中显著优于现有LLM研究智能体。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体框架偏向收敛式搜索，只能生成缺乏创造性的衍生性摘要，无法实现从被动检索到新思想创造性发现的跨越。
AI.method: Caesar包含两个核心组件：(1) 基于动态上下文感知策略驱动的知识图谱探索，用于促进关联推理；(2) 对抗性草稿优化循环控制合成过程，主动寻求新颖视角而非确认已有先验知识。
AI.result: 在需要创造力的任务中，Caesar生成的工件和答案具有高度新颖性和结构连贯性，显著优于最先进的LLM研究智能体。
AI.conclusion: 通过知识图谱与对抗性优化机制的结合，Caesar有效弥合了信息收集与新颖洞察合成之间的鸿沟，为智能体系统在创造性发现任务上开辟了新路径。

title: Slot Machines: How LLMs Keep Track of Multiple Entities
summary: Language models must bind entities to the attributes they possess and maintain several such binding relationships within a context. We study how multiple entities are represented across token positions and whether single tokens can carry bindings for more than one entity. We introduce a multi-slot probing approach that disentangles a single token's residual stream activation to recover information about both the currently described entity and the immediately preceding one. These two kinds of information are encoded in separate and largely orthogonal "current-entity" and "prior-entity" slots. We analyze the functional roles of these slots and find that they serve different purposes. In tandem with the current-entity slot, the prior-entity slot supports relational inferences, such as entity-level induction ("who came after Alice in the story?") and conflict detection between adjacent entities. However, only the current-entity slot is used for explicit factual retrieval questions ("Is anyone in the story tall?" "What is the tall entity's name?") despite these answers being linearly decodable from the prior-entity slot too. Consistent with this limitation, open-weight models perform near chance accuracy at processing syntax that forces two subject-verb-object bindings on a single token (e.g., "Alice prepares and Bob consumes food.") Interestingly, recent frontier models can parse this properly, suggesting they may have developed more sophisticated binding strategies. Overall, our results expose a gap between information that is available in activations and information the model actually uses, and suggest that the current/prior-entity slot structure is a natural substrate for behaviors that require holding two perspectives at once, such as sycophancy and deception.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多槽位探针方法发现，语言模型在残差流中采用正交的"当前实体"和"先前实体"两种槽位来编码不同实体信息，其中先前实体槽位虽包含可用信息，但模型仅在特定推理任务（如关系推断、冲突检测）中使用，而不会将其用于显式事实检索。同时发现，开放权重模型在需要单token绑定两个主谓宾结构的任务上表现接近随机，但前沿模型已具备这种能力。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型如何在多个token位置上表示多个实体，以及单个token能否同时携带多个实体的绑定关系，揭示激活值中可用信息与模型实际使用信息之间的差距。
AI.method: 提出多槽位探针方法，将单个token的残差流激活分解为"当前实体"和"先前实体"两个正交槽位，并通过实体级别归纳推理、冲突检测和显式事实检索等任务分析各槽位的功能角色。
AI.result: 当前实体和先前实体槽位是正交的且功能不同；先前实体槽位支持关系推断和冲突检测，但模型不使用其进行显式事实检索；开放权重模型难以处理单token绑定两个主谓宾结构的语法，而前沿模型表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 激活值中可用的信息与模型实际使用的信息之间存在差距；当前/先前实体槽位结构可能是支持需要同时持有两种视角的行为（如谄媚和欺骗）的自然基础。

title: Mind the Prompt: Self-adaptive Generation of Task Plan Explanations via LLMs
summary: Integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into complex software systems enables the generation of human-understandable explanations of opaque AI processes, such as automated task planning. However, the quality and reliability of these explanations heavily depend on effective prompt engineering. The lack of a systematic understanding of how diverse stakeholder groups formulate and refine prompts hinders the development of tools that can automate this process. We introduce COMPASS (COgnitive Modelling for Prompt Automated SynthesiS), a proof-of-concept self-adaptive approach that formalises prompt engineering as a cognitive and probabilistic decision-making process. COMPASS models unobservable users' latent cognitive states, such as attention and comprehension, uncertainty, and observable interaction cues as a POMDP, whose synthesised policy enables adaptive generation of explanations and prompt refinements. We evaluate COMPASS using two diverse cyber-physical system case studies to assess the adaptive explanation generation and their qualities, both quantitatively and qualitatively. Our results demonstrate the feasibility of COMPASS integrating human cognition and user profile's feedback into automated prompt synthesis in complex task planning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COMPASS，一种将提示工程形式化为认知与概率决策过程的自我自适应方法，通过POMDP建模用户认知状态以自动生成适应性解释和提示优化，并在两个案例研究中验证了其可行性。
AI.motivation: 将LLM集成到复杂系统中可生成可理解的AI解释，但提示工程的质量和可靠性缺乏系统性理解，难以自动化；不同利益相关者如何制定和优化提示缺乏认知模型支持。
AI.method: 提出COMPASS框架，将提示工程形式化为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），建模用户潜在认知状态（如注意力、理解、不确定性）和可观测交互线索，通过综合策略实现自适应解释生成与提示优化。
AI.result: 在两个不同的信息物理系统案例研究中，通过定量和定性评估验证了COMPASS在自适应解释生成和质量方面的可行性。
AI.conclusion: COMPASS能够将人类认知和用户画像反馈整合到复杂任务规划系统中的自动提示合成中，证明了该方法的可行性。

title: Domain-Aware Hierarchical Contrastive Learning for Semi-Supervised Generalization Fault Diagnosis
summary: Fault diagnosis under unseen operating conditions remains highly challenging when labeled data are scarce. Semi-supervised domain generalization fault diagnosis (SSDGFD) provides a practical solution by jointly exploiting labeled and unlabeled source domains. However, existing methods still suffer from two coupled limitations. First, pseudo-labels for unlabeled domains are typically generated primarily from knowledge learned on the labeled source domain, which neglects domain-specific geometric discrepancies and thus induces systematic cross-domain pseudo-label bias. Second, unlabeled samples are commonly handled with a hard accept-or-discard strategy, where rigid thresholding causes imbalanced sample utilization across domains, while hard-label assignment for uncertain samples can easily introduce additional noise. To address these issues, we propose a unified framework termed domain-aware hierarchical contrastive learning (DAHCL) for SSDGFD. Specifically, DAHCL introduces a domain-aware learning (DAL) module to explicitly capture source-domain geometric characteristics and calibrate pseudo-label predictions across heterogeneous source domains, thereby mitigating cross-domain bias in pseudo-label generation. In addition, DAHCL develops a hierarchical contrastive learning (HCL) module that combines dynamic confidence stratification with fuzzy contrastive supervision, enabling uncertain samples to contribute to representation learning without relying on unreliable hard labels. In this way, DAHCL jointly improves the quality of supervision and the utilization of unlabeled samples. Furthermore, to better reflect practical industrial scenarios, we incorporate engineering noise into the SSDGFD evaluation protocol. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that...

AI.tldr: 提出DAHCL框架用于半监督域泛化故障诊断，通过域感知学习校准伪标签偏差，结合层次对比学习利用不确定样本，在三个基准数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有SSDGFD方法存在两个耦合问题：1) 伪标签生成忽略域特定几何差异，导致跨域偏差；2) 对未标记样本采用硬接受/丢弃策略，造成样本利用不均且引入噪声。
AI.method: 提出DAHCL框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 域感知学习(DAL)模块，捕捉源域几何特征并校准伪标签预测；2) 层次对比学习(HCL)模块，结合动态置信度分层与模糊对比监督，让不确定样本也能参与表征学习。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的大量实验表明DAHCL方法优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DAHCL通过域感知校准和层次对比学习，有效解决了半监督域泛化故障诊断中的伪标签偏差和样本利用不均衡问题。

title: Verifying Machine Learning Interpretability Requirements through Provenance
summary: Machine Learning (ML) Engineering is a growing field that necessitates an increase in the rigor of ML development. It draws many ideas from software engineering and more specifically, from requirements engineering. Existing literature on ML Engineering defines quality models and Non-Functional Requirements (NFRs) specific to ML, in particular interpretability being one such NFR. However, a major challenge occurs in verifying ML NFRs, including interpretability. Although existing literature defines interpretability in terms of ML, it remains an immeasurable requirement, making it impossible to definitively confirm whether a model meets its interpretability requirement. This paper shows how ML provenance can be used to verify ML interpretability requirements. This work provides an approach for how ML engineers can save various types of model and data provenance to make the model's behavior transparent and interpretable. Saving this data forms the basis of quantifiable Functional Requirements (FRs) whose verification in turn verifies the interpretability NFR. Ultimately, this paper contributes a method to verify interpretability NFRs for ML models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用机器学习（ML）溯源（provenance）来验证ML模型的可解释性非功能需求（NFR），通过保存模型和数据溯源形成可量化的功能需求（FRs），从而间接验证可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有ML工程文献虽定义了可解释性等非功能需求，但可解释性难以度量，无法确认模型是否满足要求，亟需一种可验证的方法。
AI.method: 提出利用ML溯源方法，保存模型和数据溯源信息（如训练过程、数据来源、模型决策路径等），将这些溯源信息转化为可量化的功能需求（FRs），通过对这些FRs的验证来间接验证可解释性NFR。
AI.result: 提供了将不可度量的可解释性需求转化为可验证的功能需求的具体途径，使得可解释性NFR的验证成为可能。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种基于溯源的ML可解释性验证方法，为ML工程中非功能需求的严格验证提供了可行方案。

title: HyperFM: An Efficient Hyperspectral Foundation Model with Spectral Grouping
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures, to be published in CVPR 2026 findings, Code and data are publicly available on https://github.com/umbc-sanjaylab/HyperFM
summary: The NASA PACE mission provides unprecedented hyperspectral observations of ocean color, aerosols, and clouds, offering new insights into how these components interact and influence Earth's climate and air quality. Its Ocean Color Instrument measures light across hundreds of finely spaced wavelength bands, enabling detailed characterization of features such as phytoplankton composition, aerosol properties, and cloud microphysics. However, hyperspectral data of this scale is large, complex, and difficult to label, requiring specialized processing and analysis techniques. Existing foundation models, which have transformed computer vision and natural language processing, are generally trained on standard RGB imagery and therefore struggle to interpret the continuous spectral signatures captured by PACE. While recent advances have introduced hyperspectral foundation models, they are typically trained on cloud-free observations and often remain limited to single-sensor datasets due to spectral inconsistencies across instruments. Moreover, existing models tend to be parameter-heavy and computationally expensive, limiting scalability and adoption in operational settings. To address these challenges, we introduce HyperFM, a parameter-efficient hyperspectral foundation model that leverages intra-group and inter-group spectral attention along with hybrid parameter decomposition to better capture spectral spatial relationships while reducing computational cost. HyperFM demonstrates consistent performance improvements over existing hyperspectral foundation models and task-specific state-of-the-art methods across four benchmark downstream atmospheric cloud property retrieval tasks. To support further research, we additionally release HyperFM250K, a large-scale hyperspectral dataset from the PACE mission that includes both clear and cloudy scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍HyperFM，一种参数高效的高光谱基础模型，用于处理NASA PACE任务的高光谱数据。该模型通过组内和组间光谱注意力机制以及混合参数分解，在降低计算成本的同时更好地捕捉光谱空间关系，在四个大气云属性反演基准任务上表现优于现有模型。同时发布包含晴空和云场景的大规模高光谱数据集HyperFM250K。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱数据规模大、复杂且难以标注；现有基础模型主要基于RGB图像训练，无法解释PACE的连续光谱信号；现有高光谱基础模型多在无云数据上训练，受限于单传感器数据集且参数多、计算成本高。
AI.method: HyperFM采用参数高效设计，引入组内和组间光谱注意力机制（intra-group and inter-group spectral attention），结合混合参数分解（hybrid parameter decomposition），在降低计算开销的同时增强对光谱空间关系的捕捉能力。
AI.result: 在四个大气云属性反演基准任务上，HyperFM一致性地优于现有高光谱基础模型和特定任务的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HyperFM为PACE任务的高光谱数据分析提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案，同时发布的HyperFM250K数据集将推动该领域的进一步发展。

title: CRED-1: An Open Multi-Signal Domain Credibility Dataset for Automated Pre-Bunking of Online Misinformation
comment: 9 pages, 3 tables. Submitted to Data in Brief (Elsevier). Dataset: https://github.com/aloth/cred-1
summary: This article presents CRED-1, an open, reproducible domain-level credibility dataset combining two openly-licensed source lists (OpenSources.co and Iffy.news) with four computed enrichment signals: domain age (WHOIS/RDAP), web popularity (Tranco Top-1M), fact-check frequency (Google Fact Check Tools API), and threat intelligence (Google Safe Browsing API). The dataset covers 2,672 domains categorized as fake, unreliable, mixed, conspiracy, or satire, each assigned a composite credibility score between 0.0 and 1.0. CRED-1 is designed for on-device deployment in privacy-preserving browser extensions to enable client-side pre-bunking of misinformation at the content delivery stage. The entire pipeline is implemented in Python using only standard library modules and is fully reproducible from publicly available sources. The dataset and pipeline code are released under CC~BY~4.0 and archived on Zenodo.

AI.tldr: CRED-1是一个开放、可复现的领域级可信度数据集，整合了两个开源源列表和四个富集信号（域名年龄、网络流行度、事实核查频率、威胁情报），覆盖2,672个域名并赋予0.0-1.0的可信度评分，支持隐私保护的浏览器端预辟谣部署。
AI.motivation: 现有可信度数据集缺乏可复现性、开放性和多维度富集特征，难以支持隐私保护场景下的客户端预辟谣机制。
AI.method: 整合OpenSources.co和Iffy.news两个开源源列表，结合WHOIS/RDAP域名年龄、Tranco Top-1M网络流行度、Google Fact Check Tools事实核查频率和Google Safe Browsing威胁情报四个富集信号，使用Python标准库构建完整的可复现管道，采用CC BY 4.0许可发布。
AI.result: 生成了覆盖2,672个域名（含虚假、不可靠、混合、阴谋论、讽刺五类）的数据集，每个域名获得0.0-1.0的复合可信度评分，完整的分析和代码已归档于Zenodo。
AI.conclusion: CRED-1为隐私保护的浏览器端预辟谣提供了可复现、可部署的开放数据集基础，推动了信息可信度评估的透明化和民主化。

title: Using Machine Mental Imagery for Representing Common Ground in Situated Dialogue
comment: Work under review. Biswesh Mohapatra and Giovanni Duca both contributed equally to this work
summary: Situated dialogue requires speakers to maintain a reliable representation of shared context rather than reasoning only over isolated utterances. Current conversational agents often struggle with this requirement, especially when the common ground must be preserved beyond the immediate context window. In such settings, fine-grained distinctions are frequently compressed into purely textual representations, leading to a critical failure mode we call \emph{representational blur}, in which similar but distinct entities collapse into interchangeable descriptions. This semantic flattening creates an illusion of grounding, where agents appear locally coherent but fail to track shared context persistently over time. Inspired by the role of mental imagery in human reasoning, and based on the increased availability of multimodal models, we explore whether conversational agents can be given an analogous ability to construct some depictive intermediate representations during dialogue to address these limitations. Thus, we introduce an active visual scaffolding framework that incrementally converts dialogue state into a persistent visual history that can later be retrieved for grounded response generation. Evaluation on the IndiRef benchmark shows that incremental externalization itself improves over full-dialog reasoning, while visual scaffolding provides additional gains by reducing representational blur and enforcing concrete scene commitments. At the same time, textual representations remain advantageous for non-depictable information, and a hybrid multimodal setting yields the best overall performance. Together, these findings suggest that conversational agents benefit from an explicitly multimodal representation of common ground that integrates depictive and propositional information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出主动视觉脚手架框架，通过将对话状态转换为持久性视觉历史来解决对话代理在情境对话中的"表征模糊"问题。实验表明，增量式外部化优于全对话推理，视觉脚手架能减少表征模糊并强制具体场景承诺，而混合多模态设置取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 当前对话代理在需要超越即时上下文窗口维护共同基础时，常将细粒度区分压缩为纯文本表征，导致"表征模糊"——相似但不同的实体坍缩为可互换的描述，造成虚假的局部连贯性。
AI.method: 受人类心智图像启发，提出主动视觉脚手架框架：在对话过程中增量地将对话状态转换为持久的视觉历史记录，后续检索用于生成基于上下文的响应。
AI.result: 在IndiRef基准上，增量式外部化本身优于全对话推理；视觉脚手架进一步减少表征模糊并强制具体场景承诺；纯文本对不可描绘信息有优势；混合多模态设置取得整体最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 对话代理受益于整合描绘性与命题性信息的显式多模态共同表征。

title: Propensity Inference: Environmental Contributors to LLM Behaviour
summary: Motivated by loss of control risks from misaligned AI systems, we develop and apply methods for measuring language models' propensity for unsanctioned behaviour. We contribute three methodological improvements: analysing effects of changes to environmental factors on behaviour, quantifying effect sizes via Bayesian generalised linear models, and taking explicit measures against circular analysis. We apply the methodology to measure the effects of 12 environmental factors (6 strategic in nature, 6 non-strategic) and thus the extent to which behaviour is explained by strategic aspects of the environment, a question relevant to risks from misalignment. Across 23 language models and 11 evaluation environments, we find approximately equal contributions from strategic and non-strategic factors for explaining behaviour, do not find strategic factors becoming more or less influential as capabilities improve, and find some evidence for a trend for increased sensitivity to goal conflicts. Finally, we highlight a key direction for future propensity research: the development of theoretical frameworks and cognitive models of AI decision-making into empirically testable forms.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语言模型在不同环境因素下的不当行为倾向，通过12个环境因素（6个战略、6个非战略）对23个模型和11个评估环境进行测量，发现战略与非战略因素对行为解释的贡献大致相等，且未发现能力提升时战略因素影响增强的趋势。
AI.motivation: 解决AI系统因目标不一致而产生的失控风险，需要量化评估语言模型从事未经授权行为的倾向。
AI.method: 提出三项方法论改进：分析环境因素变化对行为的影响、通过贝叶斯广义线性模型量化效应量、采取明确措施避免循环分析。对23个语言模型在11个评估环境中测量12个环境因素（6战略、6非战略）的影响。
AI.result: 战略与非战略因素对行为解释的贡献大致相等；未发现战略因素随能力提升而影响力增强的趋势；发现目标冲突敏感性存在一定增强趋势的证据。
AI.conclusion: 未来倾向性研究的关键方向是发展AI决策的理论框架和认知模型，并将其转化为可经验检验的形式。

title: IRIS: Interpolative Rényi Iterative Self-play for Large Language Model Fine-Tuning
summary: Self-play fine-tuning enables large language models to improve beyond supervised fine-tuning without additional human annotations by contrasting annotated responses with self-generated ones. Many existing methods rely on a fixed divergence regime. SPIN is closely related to a KL-based regime, SPACE to a Jensen-Shannon-style objective via noise contrastive estimation, and SPIF to $χ^2$-regularized self-play. Since these divergences exhibit different strengths depending on the distributional gap between model and target, no single choice appears to provide favorable learning dynamics across training stages. We propose IRIS (Interpolative Rényi Iterative Self-play), a Rényi-based self-play fine-tuning framework with a continuously adjustable objective. IRIS decomposes into two independent tilted risk terms over annotated and synthetic data, with exponential importance weights controlled by the order parameter $α$. We show that several self-play objectives can be interpreted as limiting or representative regimes at particular values of $α$, providing a unified theoretical perspective on these methods. An adaptive order schedule further adjusts $α$ to the distributional gap, shifting from sharper importance weighting early in training to smoother refinement near convergence. Theoretically, we establish the fixed-point property of IRIS and analyze how $α$ controls gradient concentration. Experiments on Zephyr-7B and Qwen2.5-3B across ten benchmarks show that IRIS improves upon baselines, reaching 44.57\% average score with gains across iterations. In our setting, IRIS with only 26$k$ annotated samples surpasses standard supervised fine-tuning trained on the full 200$k$ dataset.

AI.tldr: IRIS提出基于Rényi散度的自博弈微调框架，通过可调节的α参数统一多种自博弈目标，并设计自适应调度策略，在Zephyr-7B和Qwen2.5-3B上超越现有方法，仅用26k标注样本就超越了全量200k监督微调的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自博弈微调方法（SPIN、SPACE、SPIF等）依赖固定的散度约束，但不同散度在不同训练阶段（模型与目标分布差距不同时）表现各异，缺乏一种能够动态适应训练进程的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出IRIS框架：1）基于Rényi散度设计可调节目标函数，分解为标注数据和合成数据上的两个独立倾斜风险项，由α参数控制指数重要性权重；2）给出自适应α调度策略，随训练进程从尖锐的重要性加权过渡到平滑的精调；3）理论证明不动点性质，分析α对梯度集中的控制机制。
AI.result: 在Zephyr-7B和Qwen2.5-3B上跨越10个基准测试，IRIS达到44.57%平均得分，且迭代间持续提升。仅用26k标注样本的IRIS超越了在全量200k数据集上训练的标准监督微调。
AI.conclusion: IRIS通过Rényi散度的可调节性统一了多种自博弈目标，自适应α调度使其在不同训练阶段都能保持有利的学习动态，在显著减少标注数据需求的同时取得了更优性能。

title: Can Large Language Models Assist the Comprehension of ROS2 Software Architectures?
summary: Context. The most used development framework for robotics software is ROS2. ROS2 architectures are highly complex, with thousands of components communicating in a decentralized fashion. Goal. We aim to evaluate how LLMs can assist in the comprehension of factual information about the architecture of ROS2 systems. Method. We conduct a controlled experiment where we administer 1,230 prompts to 9 LLMs containing architecturally-relevant questions about 3 ROS2 systems with incremental size. We provide a generic algorithm that systematically generates architecturally-relevant questions for a ROS2 system. Then, we (i) assess the accuracy of the answers of the LLMs against a ground truth established via running and monitoring the 3 ROS2 systems and (ii) qualitatively analyse the explanations provided by the LLMs. Results. Almost all questions are answered correctly across all LLMs (mean=98.22%). gemini-2.5-pro performs best (100% accuracy across all prompts and systems), followed by o3 (99.77%), and gemini-2.5-flash (99.72%); the least performing LLM is gpt-4.1 (95%). Only 300/1,230 prompts are incorrectly answered, of which 249 are about the most complex system. The coherence scores in LLM's explanations range from 0.394 for "service references" to 0.762 for "communication path". The mean perplexity varies significantly across models, with chatgpt-4o achieving the lowest score (19.6) and o4-mini the highest (103.6). Conclusions. There is great potential in the usage of LLMs to aid ROS2 developers in comprehending non-trivial aspects of the software architecture of their systems. Nevertheless, developers should be aware of the intrinsic limitations and different performances of the LLMs and take those into account when using them.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制实验评估了9种LLM在回答ROS2系统架构相关问题上的表现，发现平均准确率达98.22%，其中Gemini-2.5-pro表现最佳（100%），但模型在解释连贯性和复杂度上存在差异，且大多数错误集中在最复杂的系统上。
AI.motivation: ROS2是机器人软件开发的主流框架，但其架构极其复杂（包含数千个分布式通信组件）。研究者希望评估LLM能否帮助开发者理解这类复杂系统的架构事实信息，以提升软件理解效率。
AI.method: 研究者设计了控制实验：针对3个规模递增的ROS2系统，通过自动化算法生成架构相关问题（共1230条提示词），向9种LLM提问。通过运行并监控真实系统建立基准真相，评估LLM回答的准确性，并定性分析其解释质量。
AI.result: 所有LLM平均准确率达98.22%；Gemini-2.5-pro表现最佳（100%），GPT-4.1最差（95%）；1230条提示中仅300条回答错误，其中249条来自最复杂系统。解释连贯性得分范围（0.394-0.762），困惑度均值差异显著（19.6-103.6）。
AI.conclusion: LLM在辅助ROS2开发者理解系统架构方面潜力巨大，但开发者需注意不同LLM的性能差异和固有局限性，并据此谨慎使用。

title: WFM: 3D Wavelet Flow Matching for Ultrafast Multi-Modal MRI Synthesis
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted at MIDL 2026 (Poster)
summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable quality in multi-modal MRI synthesis, but their computational cost (hundreds of sampling steps and separate models per modality) limits clinical deployment. We observe that this inefficiency stems from an unnecessary starting point: diffusion begins from pure noise, discarding the structural information already present in available MRI sequences. We propose WFM (Wavelet Flow Matching), which instead learns a direct flow from an informed prior, the mean of conditioning modalities in wavelet space, to the target distribution. Because the source and target share underlying anatomy and differ primarily in contrast, this formulation enables accurate synthesis in just 1-2 integration steps. A single 82M-parameter model with class conditioning synthesizes all four BraTS modalities (T1, T1c, T2, FLAIR), replacing four separate diffusion models totaling 326M parameters. On BraTS 2024, WFM achieves 26.8 dB PSNR and 0.94 SSIM, within 1-2 dB of diffusion baselines, while running 250-1000x faster (0.16-0.64s vs. 160s per volume). This speed-quality trade-off makes real-time MRI synthesis practical for clinical workflows. Code is available at https://github.com/yalcintur/WFM.

AI.tldr: 提出WFM（Wavelet Flow Matching），通过在小波空间中从有信息先验（条件模态的均值）直接学习流向目标分布的流，实现1-2步快速多模态MRI合成，速度提升250-1000倍，一个模型替代四个扩散模型。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在多模态MRI合成中质量优异，但计算成本极高（需要数百采样步和每个模态单独模型），限制了临床部署。作者观察到扩散从纯噪声开始，丢弃了已有MRI序列中的结构信息，造成效率低下。
AI.method: 提出Wavelet Flow Matching (WFM)：从小波空间中有信息的先验（条件模态的均值）直接学习流向目标分布的流，而非从纯噪声开始。使用单一82M参数模型配合类别条件控制，在小波空间中合成所有四种BraTS模态。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2024上：PSNR 26.8 dB，SSIM 0.94，比扩散基线低1-2 dB，但速度提升250-1000倍（0.16-0.64s vs 160s每体积）。一个82M参数模型替代四个共326M参数的扩散模型。
AI.conclusion: WFM实现了临床可用的实时MRI合成速度，在速度-质量权衡上取得突破，使实时多模态MRI合成成为可能。

title: DiagramBank: A Large-scale Dataset of Diagram Design Exemplars with Paper Metadata for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Recent advances in autonomous ``AI scientist'' systems have demonstrated the ability to automatically write scientific manuscripts and codes with execution. However, producing a publication-grade scientific diagram (e.g., teaser figure) is still a major bottleneck in the ``end-to-end'' paper generation process. For example, a teaser figure acts as a strategic visual interface and serves a different purpose than derivative data plots. It demands conceptual synthesis and planning to translate complex logic workflow into a compelling graphic that guides intuition and sparks curiosity. Existing AI scientist systems usually omit this component or fall back to an inferior alternative. To bridge this gap, we present DiagramBank, a large-scale dataset consisting of 89,422 schematic diagrams curated from existing top-tier scientific publications, designed for multimodal retrieval and exemplar-driven scientific figure generation. DiagramBank is developed through our automated curation pipeline that extracts figures and corresponding in-text references, and uses a CLIP-based filter to differentiate schematic diagrams from standard plots or natural images. Each instance is paired with rich context from abstract, caption, to figure-reference pairs, enabling information retrieval under different query granularities. We release DiagramBank in a ready-to-index format and provide a retrieval-augmented generation codebase to demonstrate exemplar-conditioned synthesis of teaser figures. DiagramBank is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/zhangt20/DiagramBank with code at https://github.com/csml-rpi/DiagramBank.

AI.tldr: DiagramBank是一个包含89,422张来自顶级期刊的示意图数据集，专为多模态检索和示例驱动的科学图表生成而设计，填补了AI科学家系统无法自动生成出版级示意图的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科学家系统可以自动撰写论文和代码，但无法生成出版级科学示意图（如teaser figure），因为这类图表需要概念综合和规划，而现有系统要么缺失此功能，要么使用劣质替代方案。
AI.method: 通过自动化流水线从顶级期刊中提取图表及对应文内引用，利用CLIP模型区分示意图与普通图表/自然图像。每个实例配有摘要、标题到图表-引用对的丰富上下文，支持不同粒度的信息检索。
AI.result: 构建了包含89,422张示意图的大规模数据集DiagramBank，并提供了检索增强生成的代码库，用于示例条件化的teaser figures合成。
AI.conclusion: DiagramBank填补了AI科学论文生成中示意图自动生成的关键空白，通过大规模数据集和检索增强生成框架，有望推动端到端科学论文自动生成的完整流程。

title: "This Wasn't Made for Me": Recentering User Experience and Emotional Impact in the Evaluation of ASR Bias
summary: Studies on bias in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) tend to focus on reporting error rates for speakers of underrepresented dialects, yet less research examines the human side of system bias: how do system failures shape users' lived experiences, how do users feel about and react to them, and what emotional toll do these repeated failures exact? We conducted user experience studies across four U.S. locations (Atlanta, Gulf Coast, Miami Beach, and Tucson) representing distinct English dialect communities. Our findings reveal that most participants report technologies fail to consider their cultural backgrounds and require constant adjustment to achieve basic functionality. Despite these experiences, participants maintain high expectations for ASR performance and express strong willingness to contribute to model improvement. Qualitative analysis of open-ended narratives exposes the deeper costs of these failures. Participants report frustration, annoyance, and feelings of inadequacy, yet the emotional impact extends beyond momentary reactions. Participants recognize that systems were not designed for them, yet often internalize failures as personal inadequacy despite this critical awareness. They perform extensive invisible labor, including code-switching, hyper-articulation, and emotional management, to make failing systems functional. Meanwhile, their linguistic and cultural knowledge remains unrecognized by technologies that encode particular varieties as standard while rendering others marginal. These findings demonstrate that algorithmic fairness assessments based on accuracy metrics alone miss critical dimensions of harm: the emotional labor of managing repeated technological rejection, the cognitive burden of constant self-monitoring, and the psychological toll of feeling inadequate in one's native language variety.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在美国四个方言区（亚特兰大、墨西哥湾沿岸、迈阿密海滩、图森）的用户体验研究，揭示了自动语音识别（ASR）系统对非标准英语方言使用者的深层伤害：用户不仅感到沮丧和不适，还进行大量隐性劳动（语码转换、超清晰发音、情绪管理）来使系统正常工作，同时将系统失败内化为个人能力不足，尽管他们意识到系统并非为其设计。研究表明仅凭准确率等指标评估算法公平性会严重忽视情绪劳动、认知负担和心理伤害等关键维度。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR偏差研究主要关注不同方言使用者的错误率差异，忽视了系统失败如何塑造用户的真实体验、情感反应以及反复失败带来的情绪代价。本文旨在从人文视角填补这一空白。
AI.method: 在美国四个代表不同英语方言社区的地点（亚特兰大、墨西哥湾沿岸、迈阿密海滩、图森）进行用户体验研究，通过定量问卷和定性开放式叙述分析收集数据。
AI.result: 多数参与者报告技术未考虑其文化背景、需不断调整才能实现基本功能；他们对ASR性能保持高期望并愿意为模型改进做贡献；系统失败引发沮丧、烦恼和不胜任感，用户进行语码转换、超清晰发音和情绪管理等大量隐性劳动，并将失败内化为个人不足。
AI.conclusion: 仅以准确率指标衡量算法公平性会严重缺失伤害的关键维度——情绪劳动、认知负担和在自己母语变体中感到不足的心理代价。ASR公平性评估必须纳入人类体验视角。

title: AI Governance under Political Turnover: The Alignment Surface of Compliance Design
summary: Governments are increasingly interested in using AI to make administrative decisions cheaper, more scalable, and more consistent. But for probabilistic AI to be incorporated into public administration it must be embedded in a compliance layer that makes decisions reviewable, repeatable, and legally defensible. That layer can improve oversight by making departures from law easier to detect. But it can also create a stable approval boundary that political successors learn to navigate while preserving the appearance of lawful administration. We develop a formal model in which institutions choose the scale of automation, the degree of codification, and safeguards on iterative use. The model shows when these systems become vulnerable to strategic use from within government, why reforms that initially improve oversight can later increase that vulnerability, and why expansions in AI use may be difficult to unwind. Making AI usable can thus make procedures easier for future governments to learn and exploit.

AI.tldr: 本文研究政府使用AI进行行政决策时，合规层如何既改善监督又可能被后续政府利用。通过形式化模型分析自动化规模、编码程度和迭代使用保障措施，揭示了内部战略利用的脆弱性、改革先改善后增加风险的现象，以及AI使用扩张难以逆转的原因。
AI.motivation: 政府越来越有兴趣使用AI来使行政决策更便宜、更具扩展性且更一致。但概率性AI要融入公共管理，必须嵌入合规层以确保决策可审查、可重复且在法理上站得住脚。
AI.method: 开发了一个形式化模型，其中机构选择自动化规模、编码程度和迭代使用的保障措施。
AI.result: 模型显示：这些系统何时容易受到政府内部的战略利用；为何最初改善监督的改革后来可能增加这种脆弱性；以及为何AI使用的扩张可能难以逆转。
AI.conclusion: 使AI可用可能使得程序更容易被未来政府学习和利用。

title: Data-Driven Open-Loop Simulation for Digital-Twin Operator Decision Support in Wastewater Treatment
summary: Wastewater treatment plants (WWTPs) need digital-twin-style decision support tools that can simulate plant response under prescribed control plans, tolerate irregular and missing sensing, and remain informative over 12-36 h planning horizons. Meeting these requirements with full-scale plant data remains an open engineering-AI challenge. We present CCSS-RS, a controlled continuous-time state-space model that separates historical state inference from future control and exogenous rollout. The model combines typed context encoding, gain-weighted forcing of prescribed and forecast drivers, semigroup-consistent rollouts, and Student-t plus hurdle outputs for heavy-tailed and zero-inflated WWTP sensor data. On the public Avedøre full-scale benchmark, with 906,815 timesteps, 43% missingness, and 1-20 min irregular sampling, CCSS-RS achieves RMSE 0.696 and CRPS 0.349 at H=1000 across 10,000 test windows. This reduces RMSE by 40-46% relative to Neural CDE baselines and by 31-35% relative to simplified internal variants. Four case studies using a frozen checkpoint on test data demonstrate operational value: oxygen-setpoint perturbations shift predicted ammonium by -2.3 to +1.4 over horizons 300-1000; a smoothed setpoint plan ranks first in multi-criterion screening; context-only sensor outages raise monitored-variable RMSE by at most 10%; and ammonium, nitrate, and oxygen remain more accurate than persistence throughout the rollout. These results establish CCSS-RS as a practical learned simulator for offline scenario screening in industrial wastewater treatment, complementary to mechanistic models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CCSS-RS模型，一种受控连续时间状态空间模型，用于污水处理厂数字孪生决策支持。该模型能处理不规则采样和高缺失率数据，在Avedøre基准上相比Neural CDE基线RMSE降低40-46%，并通过四个案例研究验证了其在工况规划、传感器失效等场景下的实用性。
AI.motivation: 污水处理厂需要数字孪生式决策支持工具，能够模拟指定控制计划下的系统响应、容忍不规则和缺失的传感数据，并在12-36小时规划周期内保持有效。利用全规模工厂数据满足这些需求仍然是一个开放的工程AI挑战。
AI.method: 提出CCSS-RS（受控连续时间状态空间模型），将历史状态推断与未来控制和外生变量展开分离。结合类型化上下文编码、增益加权的预设与预测驱动强制、半群一致性展开，以及针对污水处理厂数据重尾和零膨胀特性的Student-t加障碍输出。
AI.result: 在Avedøre全规模公开基准上（906,815时间步，43%缺失率，1-20分钟不规则采样），CCSS-RS在H=1000上达到RMSE 0.696和CRPS 0.349。相比Neural CDE基线RMSE降低40-46%，相比简化内部变体降低31-35%。四个案例研究验证了操作价值。
AI.conclusion: CCSS-RS可作为工业污水处理中离线场景筛选的实用学习模拟器，与机理模型互补。

title: Automated LTL Specification Generation from Industrial Aerospace Requirements
summary: In the development and verification of safety-critical aero-space software, Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) has been widely used to specify complex system properties derived from requirements. However, a significant gap remains in industrial practice: translating natural language (NL) requirements into formal LTL properties is a labor-intensive and error-prone process that requires rare expertise in both aerospace control engineering and formal methods. While recent NL-to-LTL tools (e.g., NL2SPEC, NL2TL, NL2LTL) are capable of automating parts of this process, they often fail on real requirement documents in industrial settings, due to complex domain terminology or implicit temporal and logical structure. To address these challenges, we present AeroReq2LTL, a framework that automates LTL property generation for aerospace requirements using large language models (LLMs), with two key industrial innovations: (i) a data dictionary that normalizes technical jargon into precise atomic propositions; and (ii) a template-based requirement language that makes temporal cues and logical relations explicit before translation. On a real aerospace dataset, AeroReq2LTL achieves 85% precision and 88% recall in LTL generation, and its outputs can be directly consumed by existing verification tools.

AI.tldr: 提出AeroReq2LTL框架，利用大语言模型并结合数据字典和模板化需求语言，将航空航天自然语言需求自动转化为LTL属性，在真实数据集上达到85%精确率和88%召回率。
AI.motivation: 将自然语言需求转化为LTL形式化属性是航空航天工业中的关键痛点，该过程耗时、易错且需要稀缺的双领域专家知识，现有NL-to-LTL工具在真实工业文档上的表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出AeroReq2LTL框架，包含两大创新：(i) 数据字典——将领域技术术语标准化为精确的原子命题；(ii) 模板化需求语言——在翻译前显式化时间线索和逻辑关系。整体基于大语言模型实现自动化LTL属性生成。
AI.result: 在真实航空航天数据集上，AeroReq2LTL实现85%精确率和88%召回率，且生成的LTL可直接被现有验证工具使用。
AI.conclusion: AeroReq2LTL通过结合领域知识（数据字典）和结构化的需求模板，有效弥合了自然语言与形式化规约之间的鸿沟，为航空安全关键软件的自动化验证提供了可行方案。

title: Reinforcing 3D Understanding in Point-VLMs via Geometric Reward Credit Assignment
summary: Point-Vision-Language Models promise to empower embodied agents with executable spatial reasoning, yet they frequently succumb to geometric hallucination where predicted 3D structures contradict the observed 2D reality. We identify a key cause of this failure not as a representation bottleneck but as a structural misalignment in reinforcement learning, where sparse geometric tokens are drowned out by noisy and broadcasted sequence-level rewards. To resolve this causal dilution, we propose Geometric Reward Credit Assignment, a framework that disentangles holistic supervision into field-specific signals and routes them exclusively to their responsible token spans. This mechanism transforms vague feedback into precise gradient updates and effectively turns generic policy optimization into targeted structural alignment. Furthermore, we internalize physical constraints via a Reprojection-Consistency term which serves as a cross-modal verifier to penalize physically impossible geometries. Validated on a calibrated benchmark derived from ShapeNetCore, our approach bridges the reliability gap by boosting 3D KPA from 0.64 to 0.93, increasing 3D bounding box intersection over union to 0.686, and raising reprojection consistency scores to 0.852. Crucially, these gains are achieved while maintaining robust 2D localization performance, marking a meaningful step from plausible textual outputs toward physically verifiable spatial predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对点-视觉-语言模型中的几何幻觉问题，提出几何奖励信用分配框架，通过将整体监督信号解耦为字段特定信号并直接路由到对应令牌，结合重投影一致性约束，显著提升3D空间推理的可靠性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有点-视觉-语言模型虽然能赋予具身智能体可执行的空间推理能力，但经常出现几何幻觉——预测的3D结构与观察到的2D现实相矛盾。作者发现这一失败的关键原因不在于表示瓶颈，而在于强化学习中结构错位：稀疏的几何令牌被噪声和广播式的序列级奖励淹没。
AI.method: 提出几何奖励信用分配框架：1) 将整体监督信号解耦为字段特定信号，并仅路由到对应的令牌范围，将模糊反馈转化为精确梯度更新；2) 引入重投影一致性项，充当跨模态验证器，惩罚物理上不可能的几何结构。
AI.result: 在ShapeNetCore基准上：3D关键点准确率从0.64提升至0.93，3D包围框IoU提升至0.686，重投影一致性分数提升至0.852，同时保持鲁棒的2D定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法弥合了可靠性差距，标志着从合理的文本输出向物理可验证的空间预测迈出了有意义的一步。

title: Mixture of Sequence: Theme-Aware Mixture-of-Experts for Long-Sequence Recommendation
summary: Sequential recommendation has rapidly advanced in click-through rate prediction due to its ability to model dynamic user interests. A key challenge, however, lies in modeling long sequences: users often exhibit significant interest shifts, introducing substantial irrelevant or misleading information. Our empirical analysis corroborates this challenge and uncovers a recurring behavioral pattern in long sequences (\textit{session hopping}): user interests remain stable within short temporal spans (\textit{sessions}) but shift drastically across sessions and may reappear after multiple sessions. To address this challenge, we propose the Mixture of Sequence (MoS) framework, a model-agnostic MoE approach that achieves accurate predictions by extracting theme-specific and multi-scale subsequences from noisy raw user sequences. First, MoS employs a theme-aware routing mechanism to adaptively learn the latent themes of user sequences and organizes these sequences into multiple coherent subsequences. Each subsequence contains only sessions aligned with a specific theme, thereby effectively filtering out irrelevant or even misleading information introduced by user interest shifts in session hopping. In addition, to alleviate potential information loss, we introduce a multi-scale fusion mechanism, which leverages three types of experts to capture global sequence characteristics, short-term user behaviors, and theme-specific semantic patterns. Together, these two mechanisms endow MoS with the ability to deliver accurate recommendations from multi-faceted and multi-scale perspectives. Experimental results demonstrate that MoS consistently achieves the SOTA performance while introducing fewer FLOPs compared with other MoE counterparts, providing strong evidence of its excellent balance between utility and efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/xiaolin-cs/MoS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoS框架，通过主题感知路由和多尺度融合机制，从长序列中提取主题一致子序列以解决用户兴趣漂移问题，实现SOTA性能且计算效率更高。
AI.motivation: 长序列中用户存在显著的"会话跳跃"行为模式（兴趣在会话内稳定，会话间剧烈漂移且可能重现），传统方法易受无关或误导信息干扰，难以准确建模动态用户兴趣。
AI.method: 提出MoS框架：1）主题感知路由机制，自适应学习序列潜在主题并组织成多个一致子序列；2）多尺度融合机制，利用三类专家（全局特征、短期行为、主题语义）捕获多维度信息。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上取得SOTA性能，且相比其他MoE方法FLOPs更少，实现了效用与效率的良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: MoS有效解决了长序列推荐中的兴趣漂移问题，验证了主题感知子序列提取和多尺度融合的有效性，为序列推荐提供了高效、准确的模型无关解决方案。

title: Prefix Parsing is Just Parsing
summary: Prefix parsing asks whether an input prefix can be extended to a complete string generated by a given grammar. In the weighted setting, it also provides prefix probabilities, which are central to context-free language modeling, psycholinguistic analysis, and syntactically constrained generation from large language models. We introduce the prefix grammar transformation, an efficient reduction of prefix parsing to ordinary parsing. Given a grammar, our method constructs another grammar that generates exactly the prefixes of its original strings. Prefix parsing is then solved by applying any ordinary parsing algorithm on the transformed grammar without modification. The reduction is both elegant and practical: the transformed grammar is only a small factor larger than the input, and any optimized implementation can be used directly, eliminating the need for bespoke prefix-parsing algorithms. We also present a strategy-based on algorithmic differentiation-for computing the next-token weight vector, i.e., the prefix weights of all one-token extensions, enabling efficient prediction of the next token. Together, these contributions yield a simple, general, and efficient framework for prefix parsing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出前缀语法变换，将前缀解析问题转化为普通解析问题，通过构造生成原语法所有前缀的新语法，并利用算法微分计算下一个词元的权重向量，实现简单、通用且高效的前缀解析框架。
AI.motivation: 前缀解析在上下文无关语言建模、心理语言学分析和基于大型语言模型的句法约束生成中至关重要，但缺乏一种统一、高效的通用解法。
AI.method: 提出前缀语法变换：将原语法转换为生成所有前缀的新语法，使任意普通解析算法可直接应用于前缀解析；同时结合算法微分计算下一个词元的权重向量。
AI.result: 变换后的语法仅比原语法大一个较小的常数因子，且可直接利用现有优化实现，无需专门的前缀解析算法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架简单、通用且高效，消除了对定制前缀解析算法的需求，为相关应用提供了实用工具。

title: Agentic AI for Personalized Physiotherapy: A Multi-Agent Framework for Generative Video Training and Real-Time Pose Correction
comment: 3 pages, 2 figures, submitted to ICDH IEEE conference
summary: At-home physiotherapy compliance remains critically low due to a lack of personalized supervision and dynamic feedback. Existing digital health solutions rely on static, pre-recorded video libraries or generic 3D avatars that fail to account for a patient's specific injury limitations or home environment. In this paper, we propose a novel Multi-Agent System (MAS) architecture that leverages Generative AI and computer vision to close the tele-rehabilitation loop. Our framework consists of four specialized micro-agents: a Clinical Extraction Agent that parses unstructured medical notes into kinematic constraints; a Video Synthesis Agent that utilizes foundational video generation models to create personalized, patient-specific exercise videos; a Vision Processing Agent for real-time pose estimation; and a Diagnostic Feedback Agent that issues corrective instructions. We present the system architecture, detail the prototype pipeline using Large Language Models and MediaPipe, and outline our clinical evaluation plan. This work demonstrates the feasibility of combining generative media with agentic autonomous decision-making to scale personalized patient care safely and effectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于多智能体系统（MAS）和生成式AI的架构，通过四个微智能体（临床提取、视频合成、视觉处理、诊断反馈）实现个性化远程康复训练，旨在解决家庭物理治疗依从性低的问题。
AI.motivation: 家庭物理治疗的依从性极低，现有数字健康方案缺乏个性化监督和动态反馈。静态视频库或通用3D虚拟人无法考虑患者的具体伤情限制和家庭环境。
AI.method: 提出四智能体MAS架构：1）临床提取智能体解析非结构化医疗记录为运动学约束；2）视频合成智能体用基础视频生成模型创建个性化锻炼视频；3）视觉处理智能体实时姿态估计；4）诊断反馈智能体发出纠正指令。原型采用LLM和MediaPipe构建。
AI.result: 展示了系统架构，详细说明了使用大规模语言模型和MediaPipe的原型管道，并概述了临床评估计划。证明了生成式媒体与智能体自主决策结合实现安全、可扩展的个性化患者护理的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了将生成式媒体与智能体自主决策相结合，能够安全有效地规模化提供个性化患者护理。

title: Sink-Token-Aware Pruning for Fine-Grained Video Understanding in Efficient Video LLMs
summary: Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) incur high inference latency due to a large number of visual tokens provided to LLMs. To address this, training-free visual token pruning has emerged as a solution to reduce computational costs; however, existing methods are primarily validated on Multiple-Choice Question Answering (MCQA) benchmarks, where coarse-grained cues often suffice. In this work, we reveal that these methods suffer a sharp performance collapse on fine-grained understanding tasks requiring precise visual grounding, such as hallucination evaluation. To explore this gap, we conduct a systematic analysis and identify sink tokens--semantically uninformative tokens that attract excessive attention--as a key obstacle to fine-grained video understanding. When these sink tokens survive pruning, they distort the model's visual evidence and hinder fine-grained understanding. Motivated by these insights, we propose Sink-Token-aware Pruning (SToP), a simple yet effective plug-and-play method that introduces a sink score to quantify each token's tendency to behave as a sink and applies this score to existing spatial and temporal pruning methods to suppress them, thereby enhancing video understanding. To validate the effectiveness of SToP, we apply it to state-of-the-art pruning methods (VisionZip, FastVid, and Holitom) and evaluate it across diverse benchmarks covering hallucination, open-ended generation, compositional reasoning, and MCQA. Our results demonstrate that SToP significantly boosts performance, even when pruning up to 90% of visual tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉token剪枝方法在细粒度视频理解任务（如幻觉评估）中性能骤降，归因于“sink tokens”（语义空洞但吸引过多注意力的token），并提出SToP方法通过sink分数抑制这些token，在剪枝90%视觉token时仍显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有训练无关的视觉token剪枝方法主要在MCQA基准上验证，忽略了细粒度理解任务（如幻觉评估）中对精确视觉定位的需求，导致在这些任务上性能严重下降。本文旨在填补这一空白，识别并解决造成性能退化的关键障碍。
AI.method: 提出SToP（Sink-Token-aware Pruning）方法，引入sink score量化每个token成为sink token的倾向性，并将其应用于现有的空间和时间剪枝方法中，以抑制sink tokens的影响，从而提升细粒度视频理解能力。
AI.result: 将SToP应用于VisionZip、FastVid、Holitom等先进剪枝方法，在幻觉评估、开放生成、组合推理和MCQA等多种基准上测试，即使在剪枝90%视觉token时，SToP仍能显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: Sink tokens是细粒度视频理解中视觉token剪枝性能下降的关键因素；SToP作为一种轻量级插件方法，能有效抑制sink tokens，在不增加训练负担的前提下大幅提升视频LLM的推理效率和细粒度理解能力。

title: Agentic AI-assisted coding offers a unique opportunity to instill epistemic grounding during software development
summary: The capabilities of AI-assisted coding are progressing at breakneck speed. Chat-based vibe coding has evolved into fully fledged AI-assisted, agentic software development using agent scaffolds where the human developer creates a plan that agentic AIs implement. One current trend is utilizing documents beyond this plan document, such as project and method-scoped documents. Here we propose GROUNDING$.$md, a community-governed, field-scoped epistemic grounding document, using mass spectrometry-based proteomics as an example. This explicit field-scoped grounding document encodes Hard Constraints (non-negotiable validity invariants empirically required for scientific correctness) and Convention Parameters (community-agreed defaults) that override all other contexts to enforce validity, regardless of what the user prompts. In practice, this will empower a non-domain expert to generate code, tools, and software that have best practices baked in at the ground level, providing confidence to the software developer but also to those reviewing or using the final product. Undoubtedly it is easier to have agentic AIs adhere to guidelines than humans, and this opportunity allows for organizations to develop epistemic grounding documents in such a way as to keep domain experts in the loop in a future of democratized generation of bespoke software solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GROUNDING$.$md，一种由社区治理的领域范围认知基础文档，用于约束AI辅助编程，确保生成代码符合科学正确性所需的硬约束和社区约定的惯例参数，以质谱蛋白质组学为例进行说明。
AI.motivation: 当前AI辅助编程发展迅速，但非领域专家在生成科学软件时难以确保正确性和最佳实践，需要一种机制将领域知识编码到AI开发流程中。
AI.method: 提出GROUNDING$.$md文档，包含两类内容：硬约束（保证科学正确性的不可协商的有效性不变量）和惯例参数（社区约定的默认值），该文档覆盖所有其他上下文，强制执行有效性。
AI.result: 非领域专家可借助该文档生成具有内置最佳实践的代码、工具和软件，增强开发者和审查/使用者的信心。
AI.conclusion: 利用AI比人类更容易遵守指南的特点，组织可开发此类认知基础文档，让领域专家在未来民主化定制软件生成中保持参与。

title: WildSplatter: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Appearance Control from Unconstrained Images
summary: We propose WildSplatter, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) model for unconstrained images with unknown camera parameters and varying lighting conditions. 3DGS is an effective scene representation that enables high-quality, real-time rendering; however, it typically requires iterative optimization and multi-view images captured under consistent lighting with known camera parameters. WildSplatter is trained on unconstrained photo collections and jointly learns 3D Gaussians and appearance embeddings conditioned on input images. This design enables flexible modulation of Gaussian colors to represent significant variations in lighting and appearance. Our method reconstructs 3D Gaussians from sparse input views in under one second, while also enabling appearance control under diverse lighting conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing pose-free 3DGS methods on challenging real-world datasets with varying illumination.

AI.tldr: WildSplatter是一种前馈式3D高斯泼溅模型，能在无相机参数和光照条件变化的非约束图像中，快速（<1秒）重建3D高斯并实现外观控制，优于现有无位姿3DGS方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS需要已知相机参数和一致光照的多视图图像进行迭代优化，无法处理野外非约束图像（光照变化大、相机参数未知）。作者希望训练一个前馈模型，直接从稀疏输入重建3D高斯并支持外观调控。
AI.method: WildSplatter联合学习3D高斯和外观嵌入（appearance embeddings），以输入图像为条件，通过调节高斯颜色来表征光照和外观的显著变化。
AI.result: 在挑战性真实数据集上，WildSplatter优于现有无位姿3DGS方法，能在1秒内从稀疏输入重建，并支持不同光照条件下的外观控制。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种面向非约束图像的快速前馈3DGS方案，兼顾重建速度与外观可控性，适用于真实世界多变光照场景。

title: KGiRAG: An Iterative GraphRAG Approach for Responding Sensemaking Queries
comment: Paper accepted at the 18th International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence, ICAART 2026
summary: Recent literature highlights the potential of graph-based approaches within large language model (LLM) retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines for answering queries of varying complexity, particularly those that fall outside the LLM's prior knowledge. However, LLMs are prone to hallucination and often face technical limitations in handling contexts large enough to ground complex queries effectively. To address these challenges, we propose a novel iterative, feedback-driven GraphRAG architecture that leverages response quality assessment to iteratively refine outputs until a sound, well-grounded response is produced. Evaluating our approach with queries from the HotPotQA dataset, we demonstrate that this iterative RAG strategy yields responses with higher semantic quality and improved relevance compared to a single-shot baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种迭代式、基于反馈的GraphRAG架构，通过质量评估循环优化输出，在HotPotQA数据集上相比单次基线获得了更高的语义质量和相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在RAG管线中处理复杂查询时存在幻觉问题，且上下文窗口有限难以充分支撑复杂查询的推理需求。
AI.method: 构建迭代式反馈驱动的GraphRAG架构，结合响应质量评估机制，对生成结果进行多轮修正直至生成合理、有充分依据的响应。
AI.result: 在HotPotQA数据集上的实验表明，该迭代RAG策略相比单次基线方法在语义质量和相关性上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 迭代式图增强检索生成架构能有效缓解LLM幻觉问题，提升复杂查询场景下的回答质量。

title: On Reasoning Behind Next Occupation Recommendation
summary: In this work, we develop a novel reasoning approach to enhance the performance of large language models (LLMs) in future occupation prediction. In this approach, a reason generator first derives a ``reason'' for a user using his/her past education and career history. The reason summarizes the user's preference and is used as the input of an occupation predictor to recommend the user's next occupation. This two-step occupation prediction approach is, however, non-trivial as LLMs are not aligned with career paths or the unobserved reasons behind each occupation decision. We therefore propose to fine-tune LLMs improving their reasoning and occupation prediction performance. We first derive high-quality oracle reasons, as measured by factuality, coherence and utility criteria, using a LLM-as-a-Judge. These oracle reasons are then used to fine-tune small LLMs to perform reason generation and next occupation prediction. Our extensive experiments show that: (a) our approach effectively enhances LLM's accuracy in next occupation prediction making them comparable to fully supervised methods and outperforming unsupervised methods; (b) a single LLM fine-tuned to perform reason generation and occupation prediction outperforms two LLMs fine-tuned to perform the tasks separately; and (c) the next occupation prediction accuracy depends on the quality of generated reasons. Our code is available at https://github.com/Sarasarahhhhh/job_prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的推理方法来增强大语言模型在未来职业预测中的表现。该方法首先生成用户"理由"（总结其教育/职业经历中的偏好），再用该理由进行下一职业预测。通过LLM-as-a-Judge获取高质量理由来微调小模型。实验表明该方法在预测准确率上达到监督方法水平，且联合微调优于分开微调。
AI.motivation: LLM在职业预测任务中表现不佳，因为LLM与职业路径或职业决策背后不可观察的理由不对齐。现有方法未能充分利用推理能力来捕捉用户职业偏好。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：(1) 理由生成器根据用户教育和工作历史生成"理由"（概括用户偏好）；(2) 职业预测器以理由为输入预测下一职业。使用LLM-as-a-Judge按真实性、连贯性和实用性标准提取高质量理由，并用这些理由微调小型LLM。
AI.result: (a) 方法使LLM预测准确性接近全监督方法，优于无监督方法；(b) 单个LLM联合微调优于两个分开微调的LLM；(c) 预测准确率取决于生成理由的质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过生成高质量理由并微调小模型，可以有效提升LLM在未来职业预测任务上的表现，且联合训练更高效。

title: Multi-Agent Empowerment and Emergence of Complex Behavior in Groups
summary: Intrinsic motivations are receiving increasing attention, i.e. behavioral incentives that are not engineered, but emerge from the interaction of an agent with its surroundings. In this work we study the emergence of behaviors driven by one such incentive, empowerment, specifically in the context of more than one agent. We formulate a principled extension of empowerment to the multi-agent setting, and demonstrate its efficient calculation. We observe that this intrinsic motivation gives rise to characteristic modes of group-organization in two qualitatively distinct environments: a pair of agents coupled by a tendon, and a controllable Vicsek flock. This demonstrates the potential of intrinsic motivations such as empowerment to not just drive behavior for only individual agents but also higher levels of behavioral organization at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体系统中 empowerment（赋能）这一内在动机如何自发产生群体组织行为，通过 tendon-coupled 双智能体系统和可控 Vicsek 群体两种环境验证了其效果。
AI.motivation: 内在动机（如 empowerment）在单个智能体中已显示出驱动行为的能力，但其在多智能体场景下如何导致群体组织行为的涌现尚不清楚，本文旨在探索这一空白。
AI.method: 将 empowerment 扩展至多智能体场景并给出高效计算方法，在两个不同环境（tendon-coupled 双智能体系统与可控 Vicsek 群体）中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 该内在动机在两个环境中均能自发产生特征性的群体组织模式，表明 empowerment 不仅能驱动单个智能体行为，还能驱动更高层次的群体行为组织。
AI.conclusion: 内在动机（如 empowerment）具有从个体到群体层面驱动行为涌现的潜力，可用于理解和设计多智能体系统中的集体行为。

title: HARBOR: Automated Harness Optimization
summary: Long-horizon language-model agents are dominated, in lines of code and in operational complexity, not by their underlying model but by the harness that wraps it: context compaction, tool caching, semantic memory, trajectory reuse, speculative tool prediction, and the glue that binds the model to a sandboxed execution environment. We argue that harness design is a first-class machine-learning problem and that automated configuration search dominates manual stacking once the flag space exceeds a handful of bits. We defend this claim in two steps. First, we formalize automated harness optimization as constrained noisy Bayesian optimization over a mixed-variable, cost-heterogeneous configuration space with cold-start-corrected rewards and a posterior chance-constrained safety check, and give a reference solver, HARBOR (Harness Axis-aligned Regularized Bayesian Optimization Routine), built from a block-additive SAAS surrogate, multi-fidelity cost-aware acquisition, and TuRBO trust regions. Second, we instantiate the problem in a flag-gated harness over a production coding agent and report a controlled four-round manual-tuning case study against a fixed task suite and an end-to-end HARBOR run. The formulation itself is task-class agnostic: the configuration space, reward correction, acquisition, and safety check apply to any agent harness with a bounded flag space and a reproducible task suite.

AI.tldr: 本文提出智能体框架（harness）设计应被视为一流的机器学习问题，并形式化了自动化框架优化方法，通过贝叶斯优化在混合变量配置空间中搜索最优框架参数，实验表明自动化方法优于手动调优。
AI.motivation: 当前长程语言模型智能体的复杂性和代码量主要来自框架（harness）而非底层模型，但框架设计仍依赖手动堆叠，缺乏系统化的自动优化方法。
AI.method: 将自动化框架优化形式化为带约束的噪声贝叶斯优化问题，提出HARBOR求解器，包含块可加性SAAS代理模型、多保真度成本感知采集函数和TuRBO信任域，并引入冷启动校正奖励和后验概率约束安全检查。
AI.result: 在代码生成智能体上进行了四轮手动调优对照实验和端到端HARBOR运行，结果表明一旦标志空间超过少量比特，自动化配置搜索显著优于手动堆叠。
AI.conclusion: 该形式化方法是任务类无关的，配置空间、奖励校正、采集函数和安全检查适用于任何具有有界标志空间和可重复任务套件的智能体框架。

title: Less Is More: Measuring How LLM Involvement affects Chatbot Accuracy in Static Analysis
summary: Large language models are increasingly used to make static analysis tools accessible through natural language, yet existing systems differ in how much they delegate to the LLM without treating the degree of delegation as an independent variable. We compare three architectures along a spectrum of LLM involvement for translating natural language to Joern's query language \cpgql{}: direct query generation (\approach{1}), generation of a schema-constrained JSON intermediate representation (\approach{2}), and tool-augmented agentic generation (\approach{3}). These are evaluated on a benchmark of 20 code analysis tasks across three complexity tiers, using four open-weight models in a 2\(\times\)2 design (two model families \(\times\) two scales), each with three repetitions. The structured intermediate representation (\approach{2}) achieves the highest result match rates, outperforming direct generation by 15--25 percentage points on large models and surpassing the agentic approach despite the latter consuming 8\(\times\) more tokens. The benefit of structured intermediates is most pronounced for large models; for small models, schema compliance becomes the bottleneck. These findings suggest that in formally structured domains, constraining the LLM's output to a well-typed intermediate representation and delegating query construction to deterministic code yields better results than either unconstrained generation or iterative tool use.

AI.tldr: 比较了三种LLM参与程度的架构（直接生成、结构化中间表示、工具增强智能体）将自然语言转换为Joern查询语言的效果。结构化中间表示方法在大模型上表现最好，超越直接生成15-25个百分点，尽管智能体方法消耗8倍token。约束LLM输出到良好类型化的中间表示比无约束生成或迭代工具使用更有效。
AI.motivation: 现有自然语言驱动的静态分析工具在LLM参与程度上差异很大，但缺乏将其作为独立变量进行系统比较的研究。作者希望探究不同LLM介入程度对代码分析任务性能的影响。
AI.method: 设计了三种架构：(1)直接生成CPGQL查询；(2)先生成模式约束的JSON中间表示再转换；(3)工具增强的智能体式生成。在包含20个代码分析任务的基准上进行评估，使用4个开源模型（2个模型族×2个规模），每种设置重复3次。
AI.result: 结构化中间表示方法(方法2)在结果匹配率上最高，大模型上比直接生成高15-25个百分点。智能体方法(方法3)消耗8倍token但表现不如方法2。小模型的主要瓶颈是模式合规性。
AI.conclusion: 在形式化结构化领域中，约束LLM输出到类型化的中间表示，并将查询构建委托给确定性代码，比无约束生成或迭代工具使用效果更好。

title: SpatiO: Adaptive Test-Time Orchestration of Vision-Language Agents for Spatial Reasoning
summary: Understanding visual scenes requires not only recognizing objects but also reasoning about their spatial relationships. Unlike general vision-language tasks, spatial reasoning requires integrating multiple inductive biases, such as 2D appearance cues, depth signals, and geometric constraints, whose reliability varies across contexts. This suggests that effective spatial reasoning requires \emph{spatial adaptability}: the ability to flexibly coordinate different reasoning strategies depending on the input. However, most existing approaches rely on a single reasoning pipeline that implicitly learns a fixed spatial prior, limiting their ability to adapt under distribution changes. Multi-agent systems offer a promising alternative by aggregating diverse reasoning trajectories, but prior attempts in spatial reasoning primarily employ homogeneous agents, restricting the diversity of inductive biases they can leverage. In this work, we introduce \textbf{\textsc{SpatiO}}, a heterogeneous multi-agent framework for spatial reasoning that coordinates multiple vision-language specialists with complementary inductive biases. To enable effective collaboration, we propose \textbf{Test-Time Orchestration (TTO)}, an optimization mechanism that dynamically evaluates and reweights agents based on their observed reliability during inference, without modifying model parameters. Extensive experiments on diverse spatial reasoning benchmarks, including 3DSRBench, STVQA-7k, CV-Bench, and Omni3D-Bench, demonstrate that \textsc{SpatiO} consistently improves spatial reasoning performance over both closed-source and open-source baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出SpatiO，一种异构多智能体框架，通过测试时编排（TTO）机制动态协调多个视觉-语言专家进行空间推理，在各个空间推理基准上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有空间推理方法依赖单一推理管线，隐式学习固定空间先验，缺乏适应分布变化的能力；而多智能体系统之前主要使用同质智能体，限制了归纳偏见的多样性。
AI.method: 提出SpatiO异构多智能体框架，整合多个具有互补归纳偏见的视觉-语言专家；并引入测试时编排（TTO）机制，在推理阶段根据专家表现动态评估和重新加权，无需修改模型参数。
AI.result: 在3DSRBench、STVQA-7k、CV-Bench、Omni3D-Bench等多个空间推理基准上，SpatiO一致优于闭源和开源基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 异构多智能体协作结合测试时动态编排能够有效提升空间推理的适应性和性能，是处理复杂视觉场景中空间关系的有效范式。

title: RealRoute: Dynamic Query Routing System via Retrieve-then-Verify Paradigm
summary: Despite the success of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in grounding LLMs with external knowledge, its application over heterogeneous sources (e.g., private databases, global corpora, and APIs) remains a significant challenge. Existing approaches typically employ an LLM-as-a-Router to dispatch decomposed sub-queries to specific sources in a predictive manner. However, this "LLM-as-a-Router" strategy relies heavily on the semantic meaning of different data sources, often leading to routing errors when source boundaries are ambiguous. In this work, we introduce RealRoute System, a framework that shifts the paradigm from predictive routing to a robust Retrieve-then-Verify mechanism. RealRoute ensures \textit{evidence completeness through parallel, source-agnostic retrieval, followed by a dynamic verifier that cross-checks the results and synthesizes a factually grounded answer}. Our demonstration allows users to visualize the real-time "re-routing" process and inspect the verification chain across multiple knowledge silos. Experiments show that RealRoute significantly outperforms predictive baselines in the multi-hop Rag reasoning task. The RealRoute system is released as an open-source toolkit with a user-friendly web interface. The code is available at the URL: https://github.com/Joseph1951210/RealRoute.

AI.tldr: RealRoute 系统提出了一种“检索-验证”机制替代传统的“LLM作为路由器”方法，通过并行、源无关的检索后跟动态验证器交叉检查结果，显著提升了多跳RAG推理任务的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法使用LLM作为路由器将子查询预测性地分派到不同数据源，但这种方式严重依赖数据源的语义边界，当源边界模糊时容易产生路由错误。
AI.method: 提出RealRoute框架，采用并行、源无关的检索（Retrieve-then-Verify机制），随后通过动态验证器交叉检查检索结果并合成事实性答案，而非传统的预测性路由。
AI.result: 实验表明RealRoute在多跳RAG推理任务上显著优于基于预测性路由的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: RealRoute通过从“预测性路由”转向“检索-验证”范式，有效解决了异构数据源场景下的路由错误问题，提升了多跳推理的答案准确性，并提供了开源工具和用户友好的可视化界面。

title: Subject-level Inference for Realistic Text Anonymization Evaluation
summary: Current text anonymization evaluation relies on span-based metrics that fail to capture what an adversary could actually infer, and assumes a single data subject, ignoring multi-subject scenarios. To address these limitations, we present SPIA (Subject-level PII Inference Assessment), the first benchmark that shifts the unit of evaluation from text spans to individuals, comprising 675 documents across legal and online domains with novel subject-level protection metrics. Extensive experiments show that even when over 90% of PII spans are masked, subject-level inference protection drops as low as 33%, leaving the majority of personal information recoverable through contextual inference. Furthermore, target-subject-focused anonymization leaves non-target subjects substantially more exposed than the target subject. We show that subject-level inference-based evaluation is essential for ensuring safe text anonymization in real-world settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPIA基准，将文本匿名化评估从基于文本片段转移到个体层面，发现即使90%以上的PII片段被屏蔽，主题级推理保护率可低至33%，且非目标主体比目标主体暴露更严重。
AI.motivation: 现有文本匿名化评估依赖基于文本片段的指标，无法捕捉攻击者实际能推断出的信息，且假设只有一个数据主体，忽略了多主体场景。
AI.method: 提出SPIA（Subject-level PII Inference Assessment）基准，将评估单位从文本片段转向个体，包含675份法律和在线领域文档，并引入新颖的主体级保护指标。
AI.result: 超过90%的PII片段被屏蔽时，主体级推理保护率低至33%；针对目标主体的匿名化导致非目标主体比目标主体暴露更严重。
AI.conclusion: 主体级基于推理的评估对于保障现实世界中安全的文本匿名化至关重要。

title: Trust but Verify: Introducing DAVinCI -- A Framework for Dual Attribution and Verification in Claim Inference for Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable fluency and versatility across a wide range of NLP tasks, yet they remain prone to factual inaccuracies and hallucinations. This limitation poses significant risks in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, law, and scientific communication, where trust and verifiability are paramount. In this paper, we introduce DAVinCI - a Dual Attribution and Verification framework designed to enhance the factual reliability and interpretability of LLM outputs. DAVinCI operates in two stages: (i) it attributes generated claims to internal model components and external sources; (ii) it verifies each claim using entailment-based reasoning and confidence calibration. We evaluate DAVinCI across multiple datasets, including FEVER and CLIMATE-FEVER, and compare its performance against standard verification-only baselines. Our results show that DAVinCI significantly improves classification accuracy, attribution precision, recall, and F1-score by 5-20%. Through an extensive ablation study, we isolate the contributions of evidence span selection, recalibration thresholds, and retrieval quality. We also release a modular DAVinCI implementation that can be integrated into existing LLM pipelines. By bridging attribution and verification, DAVinCI offers a scalable path to auditable, trustworthy AI systems. This work contributes to the growing effort to make LLMs not only powerful but also accountable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAVinCI框架，通过归因与验证两阶段机制，显著提升LLM输出的事实可靠性，在多个数据集上实现5-20%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: LLM虽表现出色，但在医疗、法律等高风险领域存在事实不准确和幻觉问题，缺乏可信赖性和可验证性。
AI.method: DAVinCI采用两阶段框架：第一阶段将生成的内容归因到内部模型组件和外部来源；第二阶段通过蕴含推理和置信度校准验证每个声明。
AI.result: 在FEVER和CLIMATE-FEVER等数据集上，相比标准基线，分类准确率、归因精确率、召回率和F1分数提升5-20%。消融实验验证了证据跨度选择、重新校准阈值和检索质量等组件的贡献。
AI.conclusion: DAVinCI通过桥接归因与验证，为构建可审计、可信赖的AI系统提供了可扩展的路径，发布了模块化实现以便集成到现有LLM流水线中。

title: SCM: Sleep-Consolidated Memory with Algorithmic Forgetting for Large Language Models
summary: We present SCM (Sleep-Consolidated Memory), a research preview of a memory architecture for large language models that draws on neuroscientific principles to address a fundamental limitation in current systems: the absence of persistent, structured, and biologically plausible memory. Existing approaches rely on truncating context windows, growing vector databases without bound, or tiered storage systems that lack consolidation and forgetting mechanisms. SCM implements five core components inspired by human memory: a limited-capacity working memory, multi-dimensional importance tagging, offline sleep-stage consolidation with distinct NREM and REM phases, intentional value-based forgetting, and a computational self-model enabling introspection. Across a standardized benchmark suite of eight tests, the prototype achieves perfect recall accuracy over ten-turn conversations while reducing memory noise by 90.9% through adaptive forgetting. Memory search latency remains below one millisecond even with hundreds of stored concepts. This work establishes the architectural foundations for memory systems that consolidate, prioritize, and forget, offering a testable platform for advancing LLM memory research.

AI.tldr: SCM是一种借鉴神经科学原理的大语言模型记忆架构，包含工作记忆、重要性标记、睡眠阶段记忆巩固、价值导向遗忘和自我建模五个核心组件，在八项基准测试中实现十轮对话完美召回，记忆噪声降低90.9%，搜索延迟低于1毫秒。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM记忆系统存在上下文窗口截断、向量数据库无限增长、缺乏巩固与遗忘机制等问题，缺少持久、结构化且生物合理的记忆架构。
AI.method: 设计五核心组件：有限容量工作记忆、多维重要性标记、NREM/REM两阶段离线睡眠巩固、价值导向遗忘机制、以及具备内省能力的计算自模型。
AI.result: 在八项标准化基准测试中，十轮对话完美召回，记忆噪声降低90.9%，数百概念下搜索延迟低于1毫秒。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了具备巩固、优先排序和遗忘能力的记忆系统架构基础，为推进LLM记忆研究提供了可测试的平台。

title: Generalizing Test Cases for Comprehensive Test Scenario Coverage
summary: Test cases are essential for software development and maintenance. In practice, developers derive multiple test cases from an implicit pattern based on their understanding of requirements and inference of diverse test scenarios, each validating a specific behavior of the focal method. However, producing comprehensive tests is time-consuming and error-prone: many important tests that should have accompanied the initial test are added only after a significant delay, sometimes only after bugs are triggered. Existing automated test generation techniques largely focus on code coverage. Yet in real projects, practical tests are seldom driven by code coverage alone, since test scenarios do not necessarily align with control-flow branches. Instead, test scenarios originate from requirements, which are often undocumented and implicitly embedded in a project's design and implementation. However, developer-written tests are frequently treated as executable specifications; thus, even a single initial test that reflects the developer's intent can reveal the underlying requirement and the diverse scenarios that should be validated. In this work, we propose TestGeneralizer, a framework for generalizing test cases to comprehensively cover test scenarios. TestGeneralizer orchestrates three stages: (1) enhancing the understanding of the requirement and scenario behind the focal method and initial test; (2) generating a test scenario template and crystallizing it into various test scenario instances; and (3) generating and refining executable test cases from these instances. We evaluate TestGeneralizer against three state-of-the-art baselines on 12 open-source Java projects. TestGeneralizer achieves significant improvements: +31.66% and +23.08% over ChatTester, in mutation-based and LLM-assessed scenario coverage, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TestGeneralizer框架，通过三个阶段（需求理解、场景模板生成、测试用例生成与优化）从单个初始测试用例泛化出覆盖全面测试场景的测试用例，在12个Java项目上相比基线方法在变异覆盖和LLM评估的场景覆盖上分别提升31.66%和23.08%。
AI.motivation: 开发者在实际中难以生成全面的测试用例，现有自动化测试工具主要关注代码覆盖率而非真正的测试场景，而测试场景源自未文档化的需求，导致重要测试常被延迟甚至遗漏。
AI.method: TestGeneralizer框架包含三个阶段：1) 增强对焦点方法和初始测试背后需求与场景的理解；2) 生成测试场景模板并具体化为多种场景实例；3) 从这些实例生成并优化可执行测试用例。
AI.result: 在12个开源Java项目上，相比ChatTester等基线方法，在基于变异的场景覆盖上提升31.66%，在LLM评估的场景覆盖上提升23.08%。
AI.conclusion: 利用单个初始测试用例即可泛化出覆盖多样测试场景的测试套件，比现有代码覆盖驱动的方法更符合实际开发中对测试场景完整性的需求。

title: A Probabilistic Framework for Improving Dense Object Detection in Underwater Image Data via Annealing-Based Data Augmentation
summary: Object detection models typically perform well on images captured in controlled environments with stable lighting, water clarity, and viewpoint, but their performance degrades substantially in real-world underwater settings characterized by high variability and frequent occlusions. In this work, we address these challenges by introducing a novel data augmentation framework designed to improve robustness in dense and unconstrained underwater scenes. Using the DeepFish dataset, which contains images of fish in natural environments, we first generate bounding box annotations from provided segmentation masks to construct a custom detection dataset. We then propose a pseudo-simulated annealing-based augmentation algorithm, inspired by the copy-paste strategy of Deng et al. [1], to synthesize realistic crowded fish scenarios. Our approach improves spatial diversity and object density during training, enabling better generalization to complex scenes. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms a baseline YOLOv10 model, particularly on a challenging test set of manually annotated images collected from live-stream footage in the Florida Keys. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of our augmentation strategy for improving detection performance in dense, real-world underwater environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪模拟退火的Copy-Paste数据增强框架，用于提升水下密集场景中鱼类检测的鲁棒性，在DeepFish数据集和佛罗里达实况流视频上显著优于YOLOv10基线。
AI.motivation: 水下环境光照、水质、视角多变且遮挡频繁，现有目标检测模型在真实水下场景中性能严重下降，亟需提升模型在密集、无约束水下场景中的泛化能力。
AI.method: 1) 从DeepFish分割掩码生成边界框标注构建检测数据集；2) 提出伪模拟退火增强算法（基于Deng等人的Copy-Paste策略），合成逼真的密集鱼类场景，提升空间多样性和目标密度。
AI.result: 在佛罗里达群岛实况流视频人工标注的困难测试集上，该方法显著超越YOLOv10基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的数据增强策略能有效提升密集真实水下环境中的检测性能，为水下视觉检测提供了实用的改进方向。

title: Deep Interest Mining with Cross-Modal Alignment for SemanticID Generation in Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative Recommendation (GR) has demonstrated remarkable performance in next-token prediction paradigms, which relies on Semantic IDs (SIDs) to compress trillion-scale data into learnable vocabulary sequences. However, existing methods suffer from three critical limitations: (1) Information Degradation: the two-stage compression pipeline causes semantic loss and information degradation, with no posterior mechanism to distinguish high-quality from low-quality SIDs; (2) Semantic Degradation: cascaded quantization discards key semantic information from original multimodal features, as the embedding generation and quantization stages are not jointly optimized toward a unified objective; (3) Modality Distortion: quantizers fail to properly align text and image modalities, causing feature misalignment even when upstream networks have aligned them. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework integrating three key innovations: Deep Contextual Interest Mining (DCIM), Cross-Modal Semantic Alignment (CMSA), and Quality-Aware Reinforcement Mechanism (QARM). First, we leverage Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to align non-textual modalities into a unified text-based semantic space, mitigating modality distortion. Second, we introduce a deep interest mining mechanism that captures high-level semantic information implicitly present in advertising contexts, encouraging SIDs to preserve critical contextual information through reconstruction-based supervision. Third, we employ a reinforcement learning framework with quality-aware rewards to encourage semantically rich SIDs while suppressing low-quality ones in the posterior stage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art SID generation methods, achieving superior performance on multiple benchmarks. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each proposed component

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合深度上下文兴趣挖掘、跨模态语义对齐和质量感知强化机制的新型生成式推荐框架，用于解决现有语义ID生成方法中的信息退化、语义退化和模态失真问题，实验结果表明该方法显著优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式推荐方法采用两阶段压缩流水线生成语义ID，存在三个关键缺陷：(1)信息退化——两阶段压缩导致语义丢失，且缺乏后验机制区分高低质量SID；(2)语义退化——级联量化丢弃了原始多模态特征的关键语义信息，嵌入生成与量化阶段未联合优化；(3)模态失真——量化器无法正确对齐文本与图像模态，即使上游网络已对齐，仍造成特征错位。
AI.method: 提出三个核心创新模块：1) 深度上下文兴趣挖掘(DCIM)——利用重构监督信号，挖掘广告上下文中隐含的高层语义信息，促使SID保留关键上下文信息；2) 跨模态语义对齐(CMSA)——借助视觉语言模型(VLM)将非文本模态对齐到统一文本语义空间，缓解模态失真；3) 质量感知强化机制(QARM)——采用强化学习框架，通过质量感知奖励鼓励生成富含语义的SID，同时在后验阶段抑制低质量SID。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在各项评估指标上均持续优于当前最先进的SID生成方法，消融实验进一步验证了各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将多模态语义对齐、深度兴趣挖掘与强化学习质量感知机制有机结合，有效解决了现有SID生成中的信息退化、语义退化和模态失真问题，为生成式推荐系统提供了一种更优的语义ID生成方案。

title: Zero-Shot Detection of LLM-Generated Text via Implicit Reward Model
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across various tasks. However, their ability to generate human-like text has raised concerns about potential misuse. This underscores the need for reliable and effective methods to detect LLM-generated text. In this paper, we propose IRM, a novel zero-shot approach that leverages Implicit Reward Models for LLM-generated text detection. Such implicit reward models can be derived from publicly available instruction-tuned and base models. Previous reward-based method relies on preference construction and task-specific fine-tuning. In comparison, IRM requires neither preference collection nor additional training. We evaluate IRM on the DetectRL benchmark and demonstrate that IRM can achieve superior detection performance, outperforms existing zero-shot and supervised methods in LLM-generated text detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IRM方法，利用隐式奖励模型以零样本方式检测LLM生成文本，无需偏好收集或额外训练，在DetectRL基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: LLM生成的文本可能被滥用，需要可靠的检测方法。现有方法需要偏好构建或任务特定微调，成本高且泛化性差。
AI.method: 提出IRM方法，从公开的指令微调模型和基础模型中提取隐式奖励模型，以零样本方式检测LLM生成文本，无需偏好数据收集和额外训练。
AI.result: 在DetectRL基准上，IRM在检测LLM生成文本任务上优于现有零样本方法和监督方法，取得了最先进的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: IRM是一种高效、无需训练的零样本检测方法，能够可靠区分人类与LLM生成文本，为文本溯源提供新思路。

title: Align Generative Artificial Intelligence with Human Preferences: A Novel Large Language Model Fine-Tuning Method for Online Review Management
comment: Accepted to Information Systems Research (ISR). This is a preliminary version
summary: Online reviews have played a pivotal role in consumers' decision-making processes. Existing research has highlighted the significant impact of managerial review responses on customer relationship management and firm performance. However, a large portion of online reviews remains unaddressed due to the considerable human labor required to respond to the rapid growth of online reviews. While generative AI has achieved remarkable success in a range of tasks, they are general-purpose models and may not align well with domain-specific human preferences. To tailor these general generative AI models to domain-specific applications, finetuning is commonly employed. Nevertheless, several challenges persist in finetuning with domain-specific data, including hallucinations, difficulty in representing domain-specific human preferences, and over conservatism in offline policy optimization.
