comment: Accepted to the Social Choice and Learning Algorithms Workshop at IJCAI 2025
summary: A primary goal of online deliberation platforms is to identify ideas that are broadly agreeable to a community of users through their expressed preferences. Yet, consensus elicitation should ideally extend beyond the specific statements provided by users and should incorporate the relative salience of particular topics. We address this issue by modelling consensus as an interval in a one-dimensional opinion space derived from potentially high-dimensional data via embedding and dimensionality reduction. We define an objective that maximizes expected agreement within a hypothesis interval where the expectation is over an underlying distribution of issues, implicitly taking into account their salience. We propose an efficient Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) algorithm and establish PAC-learning guarantees. Our initial experiments demonstrate the performance of our algorithm and examine more efficient approaches to identifying optimal consensus regions. We find that through selectively querying users on an existing sample of statements, we can reduce the number of queries needed to a practical number.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过嵌入和降维将共识建模为一维意见空间中的区间的方法，利用经验风险最小化算法高效识别最优共识区域，并通过选择性查询减少所需用户反馈数量。
AI.motivation: 现有在线 deliberation 平台主要依赖用户对特定陈述的直接偏好来识别共识，但未能充分考虑不同议题的相对显著性（salience），且共识应当超越用户提供的具体陈述。
AI.method: 将共识建模为经嵌入和降维后的一维意见空间中的假设区间，提出基于经验风险最小化（ERM）的算法，并提供PAC学习理论保证。通过选择性查询已有陈述样本来减少查询次数。
AI.result: 初步实验验证了算法性能，并发现通过选择性查询用户可以有效将查询次数降低到实际可行的数量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够更高效地识别广泛的共识区间，同时通过降维和选择性查询策略提高了实际部署的可行性。

title: Reshoot-Anything: A Self-Supervised Model for In-the-Wild Video Reshooting
summary: Precise camera control for reshooting dynamic videos is bottlenecked by the severe scarcity of paired multi-view data for non-rigid scenes. We overcome this limitation with a highly scalable self-supervised framework capable of leveraging internet-scale monocular videos. Our core contribution is the generation of pseudo multi-view training triplets, consisting of a source video, a geometric anchor, and a target video. We achieve this by extracting distinct smooth random-walk crop trajectories from a single input video to serve as the source and target views. The anchor is synthetically generated by forward-warping the first frame of the source with a dense tracking field, which effectively simulates the distorted point-cloud inputs expected at inference. Because our independent cropping strategy introduces spatial misalignment and artificial occlusions, the model cannot simply copy information from the current source frame. Instead, it is forced to implicitly learn 4D spatiotemporal structures by actively routing and re-projecting missing high-fidelity textures across distinct times and viewpoints from the source video to reconstruct the target. At inference, our minimally adapted diffusion transformer utilizes a 4D point-cloud derived anchor to achieve state-of-the-art temporal consistency, robust camera control, and high-fidelity novel view synthesis on complex dynamic scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自监督框架，利用互联网单目视频生成伪多视图三元组（源视频、几何锚点、目标视频），通过随机游走裁剪策略和4D点云锚点，实现动态场景的高保真新视角合成和精确相机控制。
AI.motivation: 动态视频重拍中精确相机控制受限于非刚性场景的多视图配对数据严重匮乏。
AI.method: 从单目视频中提取随机游走裁剪轨迹生成源视图和目标视图，通过前向扭曲源视频第一帧合成几何锚点，构建伪多视图训练三元组；模型被迫学习4D时空结构，在推理时使用4D点云锚点的扩散Transformer。
AI.result: 在复杂动态场景上实现了最先进的时间一致性、鲁棒相机控制和高保真新视角合成。
AI.conclusion: 通过自监督方式利用单目视频学习4D时空结构，有效解决了动态场景多视图数据稀缺问题。

title: GFlowState: Visualizing the Training of Generative Flow Networks Beyond the Reward
summary: We present GFlowState, a visual analytics system designed to illuminate the training process of Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets or GFNs). GFlowNets are a probabilistic framework for generating samples proportionally to a reward function. While GFlowNets have proved to be powerful tools in applications such as molecule and material discovery, their training dynamics remain difficult to interpret. Standard machine learning tools allow metric tracking but do not reveal how models explore the sample space, construct sample trajectories, or shift sampling probabilities during training. Our solution, GFlowState, allows users to analyze sampling trajectories, compare the sample space relative to reference datasets, and analyze the training dynamics. To this end, we introduce multiple views, including a chart of candidate rankings, a state projection, a node-link diagram of the trajectory network, and a transition heatmap. These visualizations enable GFlowNet developers and users to investigate sampling behavior and policy evolution, and to identify underexplored regions and sources of training failure. Case studies demonstrate how the system supports debugging and assessing the quality of GFlowNets across application domains. By making the structural dynamics of GFlowNets observable, our work enhances their interpretability and can accelerate GFlowNet development in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GFlowState，一个可视化分析系统，用于揭示生成流网络（GFlowNets）的训练过程，帮助用户分析采样轨迹、空间探索和策略演化。
AI.motivation: GFlowNets在分子和材料发现等领域表现出色，但其训练动态难以解释，现有工具仅能追踪指标，无法揭示模型如何探索样本空间、构建轨迹或调整采样概率。
AI.method: 设计了多个可视化视图，包括候选排名图、状态投影图、轨迹网络节点链接图和转换热力图，支持采样行为分析和策略演化追踪。
AI.result: 通过案例研究展示了系统在调试和评估GFlowNets质量方面的有效性，覆盖多个应用领域。
AI.conclusion: GFlowState使GFlowNets的结构动态变得可观测，增强了可解释性，可加速GFlowNets的实际开发。

title: From Codebooks to VLMs: Evaluating Automated Visual Discourse Analysis for Climate Change on Social Media
summary: Social media platforms have become primary arenas for climate communication, generating millions of images and posts that - if systematically analysed - can reveal which communication strategies mobilise public concern and which fall flat. We aim to facilitate such research by analysing how computer vision methods can be used for social media discourse analysis. This analysis includes application-based taxonomy design, model selection, prompt engineering, and validation. We benchmark six promptable vision-language models and 15 zero-shot CLIP-like models on two datasets from X (formerly Twitter) - a 1,038-image expert-annotated set and a larger corpus of over 1.2 million images, with 50,000 labels manually validated - spanning five annotation dimensions: animal content, climate change consequences, climate action, image setting, and image type. Among the models benchmarked, Gemini-3.1-flash-lite outperforms all others across all super-categories and both datasets, while the gap to open-weight models of moderate size remains relatively small. Beyond instance-level metrics, we advocate for distributional evaluation: VLM predictions can reliably recover population level trends even when per-image accuracy is moderate, making them a viable starting point for discourse analysis at scale. We find that chain-of-thought reasoning reduces rather than improves performance, and that annotation dimension specific prompt design improves performance. We release tweet IDs and labels along with our code at https://github.com/KathPra/Codebooks2VLMs.git.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用计算机视觉方法（特别是视觉语言模型）对社交媒体（X平台）上的气候传播图像进行系统分析，通过基准测试多种模型，发现Gemini-3.1-flash-lite表现最佳，并提出了分布级评估方法，证明VLM可在中等精度下可靠恢复总体趋势。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体已成为气候传播的主要阵地，但海量图像和帖文缺乏系统性分析方法，难以识别哪些传播策略能有效调动公众关注。作者旨在通过计算机视觉方法解决这一问题，为大规模话语分析提供可行工具。
AI.method: 设计了应用导向的分类体系，对6个可提示视觉语言模型（VLM）和15个零样本CLIP类模型进行基准测试，使用两大数据集（1,038张专家标注集和逾120万张图像的大规模语料库），覆盖5个标注维度（动物内容、气候变化后果、气候行动、图像场景、图像类型）。实验还包括思维链推理效果评估和提示设计优化。
AI.result: Gemini-3.1-flash-lite在所有超类别和两个数据集上均表现最佳，但与中等规模开源模型的差距较小。思维链推理反而降低性能，而针对标注维度的特定提示设计可提升性能。分布级评估表明，即使单图精度中等，VLM也能可靠恢复总体趋势。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型可作为大规模气候传播话语分析的可行起点，分布级评估比逐图像精度更具实践价值。作者公开了推文ID、标签和代码以促进后续研究。

title: A Scale-Adaptive Framework for Joint Spatiotemporal Super-Resolution with Diffusion Models
summary: Deep-learning video super-resolution has progressed rapidly, but climate applications typically super-resolve (increase resolution) either space or time, and joint spatiotemporal models are often designed for a single pair of super-resolution (SR) factors (upscaling spatial and temporal ratio between the low-resolution sequence and the high-resolution sequence), limiting transfer across spatial resolutions and temporal cadences (frame rates). We present a scale-adaptive framework that reuses the same architecture across factors by decomposing spatiotemporal SR into a deterministic prediction of the conditional mean, with attention, and a residual conditional diffusion model, with an optional mass-conservation (same precipitation amount in inputs and outputs) transform to preserve aggregated totals. Assuming that larger SR factors primarily increase underdetermination (hence required context and residual uncertainty) rather than changing the conditional-mean structure, scale adaptivity is achieved by retuning three factor-dependent hyperparameters before retraining: the diffusion noise schedule amplitude beta (larger for larger factors to increase diversity), the temporal context length L (set to maintain comparable attention horizons across cadences) and optionally a third, the mass-conservation function f (tapered to limit the amplification of extremes for large factors). Demonstrated on reanalysis precipitation over France (Comephore), the same architecture spans super-resolution factors from 1 to 25 in space and 1 to 6 in time, yielding a reusable architecture and tuning recipe for joint spatiotemporal super-resolution across scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种尺度自适应的联合时空超分辨率框架，通过分解为确定性条件均值预测（含注意力机制）和残差条件扩散模型，并引入质量守恒变换，仅需调整三个超参数（噪声调度幅度、时间上下文长度、质量守恒函数）即可在同一架构下处理不同时空超分辨率因子（空间1-25倍、时间1-6倍），在法国降水再分析数据上验证了其跨尺度的可重用性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习的视频超分辨率方法在气候应用中通常仅单独处理空间或时间维度，且联合时空模型往往针对单一超分辨率因子设计，缺乏跨空间分辨率和时间帧率的迁移能力。
AI.method: 将联合时空超分辨率分解为两个部分：1) 带注意力的确定性条件均值预测；2) 残差条件扩散模型（可选质量守恒变换以保持总量）。通过调整三个因子依赖的超参数实现尺度自适应：扩散噪声调度幅度β（大因子时增大以增加多样性）、时间上下文长度L（保持注意力视野可比）、质量守恒函数f（大因子时衰减以避免极端值放大）。
AI.result: 在法国Comephore降水再分析数据上，同一架构覆盖了空间1-25倍和/or时间1-6倍的超分辨率因子。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种可重用的架构和调参方案，实现跨尺度的联合时空超分辨率。

title: SyMTRS: Benchmark Multi-Task Synthetic Dataset for Depth, Domain Adaptation and Super-Resolution in Aerial Imagery
summary: Recent advances in deep learning for remote sensing rely heavily on large annotated datasets, yet acquiring high-quality ground truth for geometric, radiometric, and multi-domain tasks remains costly and often infeasible. In particular, the lack of accurate depth annotations, controlled illumination variations, and multi-scale paired imagery limits progress in monocular depth estimation, domain adaptation, and super-resolution for aerial scenes. We present SyMTRS, a large-scale synthetic dataset generated using a high-fidelity urban simulation pipeline. The dataset provides high-resolution RGB aerial imagery (2048 x 2048), pixel-perfect depth maps, night-time counterparts for domain adaptation, and aligned low-resolution variants for super-resolution at x2, x4, and x8 scales. Unlike existing remote sensing datasets that focus on a single task or modality, SyMTRS is designed as a unified multi-task benchmark enabling joint research in geometric understanding, cross-domain robustness, and resolution enhancement. We describe the dataset generation process, its statistical properties, and its positioning relative to existing benchmarks. SyMTRS aims to bridge critical gaps in remote sensing research by enabling controlled experiments with perfect geometric ground truth and consistent multi-domain supervision. The results obtained in this work can be reproduced from this Github repository: https://github.com/safouaneelg/SyMTRS.

AI.tldr: SyMTRS是一个大规模合成遥感数据集，提供高分辨率RGB图像、完美深度图、夜间图像及多尺度低分辨率变体，旨在统一支持单目深度估计、域适应和超分辨率等多任务研究。
AI.motivation: 真实遥感数据标注成本高且难以获取高质量的地面真值（如精确深度图、可控光照变化等），限制了深度估计、域适应和超分辨率等任务的发展。现有数据集多聚焦单一任务或模态，缺乏统一的多任务基准。
AI.method: 使用高保真城市仿真管线生成大规模合成数据集，包含2048x2048高分辨率RGB航拍图像、像素级完美深度图、夜间图像（域适应）以及x2/x4/x8对齐低分辨率变体（超分辨率）。
AI.result: 提供了一个统一的多任务基准，填补了几何理解、跨域鲁棒性和分辨率增强等领域的关键空白，支持带有完美几何真值和一致多域监督的受控实验。
AI.conclusion: SyMTRS通过合成数据解决了真实标注的瓶颈问题，为遥感多任务联合研究提供了可控实验平台，相关代码和数据集已开源。

title: Low-Rank Adaptation Redux for Large Models
summary: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) has emerged as the de facto standard for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) of foundation models, enabling the adaptation of billion-parameter networks with minimal computational and memory overhead. Despite its empirical success and rapid proliferation of variants, it remains elusive which architectural choices, optimization techniques, and deployment constraints should guide practical method selection. This overview revisits LoRA through the lens of signal processing (SP), bridging modern adapter designs with classical low-rank modeling tools and inverse problems, as well as highlighting how SP principles can inform principled advances of fine-tuning approaches. Rather than providing a comprehensive enumeration and empirical comparisons of LoRA variants, emphasis is placed on the technical mechanisms underpinning these approaches to justify their effectiveness. These advances are categorized into three complementary axes: architectural design, efficient optimization, and pertinent applications. The first axis builds on singular value decomposition (SVD)-based factorization, rank-augmentation constructions, and cross-layer tensorization, while the second axis deals with initialization, alternating solvers, gauge-invariant optimization, and parameterization-aware methods. Beyond fine-tuning, emerging applications of LoRA are accounted across the entire lifecycle of large models, ranging from pre- and post-training to serving/deployment. Finally, open research directions are outlined at the confluence of SP and deep learning to catalyze a bidirectional frontier: classical SP tools provide a principled vocabulary for designing principled PEFT methods, while the unique challenges facing modern deep learning, especially the overwhelming scale and prohibitive overhead, also offer new research lines benefiting the SP community in return.

AI.tldr: 本文从信号处理视角重新审视LoRA（低秩适配），将其与经典低秩建模工具和逆问题联系起来，从架构设计、高效优化和相关应用三个维度系统梳理了LoRA变体的技术机制，并展望了信号处理与深度学习双向融合的研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管LoRA已成为参数高效微调的事实标准且涌现了大量变体，但哪些架构选择、优化技术和部署约束应指导实际方法选择仍不清晰，缺乏从原理层面对其有效性进行解释的统一视角。
AI.method: 本文采用信号处理视角重新审视LoRA，将其与经典低秩建模工具（如SVD分解）和逆问题相联系，从架构设计（SVD分解、秩增强、跨层张量化）、高效优化（初始化、交替求解器、规范不变优化、参数化感知方法）和应用部署三个互补轴心对LoRA变体的技术机制进行分类和阐释。
AI.result: 建立了LoRA与信号处理理论之间的桥梁，系统解释了各类LoRA变体有效性的底层机制，并覆盖了从预训练、后训练到服务部署的完整大模型生命周期应用。
AI.conclusion: 信号处理工具为设计原则性的PEFT方法提供了原则性词汇，同时大模型带来的独特挑战（如规模庞大和过高开销）也为信号处理社区提供了新的研究问题，形成双向促进的前沿。

title: TEMA: Anchor the Image, Follow the Text for Multi-Modification Composed Image Retrieval
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is an important image retrieval paradigm that enables users to retrieve a target image using a multimodal query that consists of a reference image and modification text. Although research on CIR has made significant progress, prevailing setups still rely simple modification texts that typically cover only a limited range of salient changes, which induces two limitations highly relevant to practical applications, namely Insufficient Entity Coverage and Clause-Entity Misalignment. In order to address these issues and bring CIR closer to real-world use, we construct two instruction-rich multi-modification datasets, M-FashionIQ and M-CIRR. In addition, we propose TEMA, the Text-oriented Entity Mapping Architecture, which is the first CIR framework designed for multi-modification while also accommodating simple modifications. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that TEMA's superiority in both original and multi-modification scenarios, while maintaining an optimal balance between retrieval accuracy and computational efficiency. Our codes and constructed multi-modification dataset (M-FashionIQ and M-CIRR) are available at https://github.com/lee-zixu/ACL26-TEMA/.

AI.tldr: 本文针对组合图像检索（CIR）中现有数据集仅包含简单修改文本、存在实体覆盖不足和从句-实体错位两个问题，构建了多修改指令数据集M-FashionIQ和M-CIRR，并提出了首个支持多修改的CIR框架TEMA（文本导向的实体映射架构），在四个基准数据集上验证了其优越性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有CIR研究过度依赖仅覆盖少量显著变化的简单修改文本，导致两个实际应用困境：实体覆盖不足（Insufficient Entity Coverage）和从句-实体错位（Clause-Entity Misalignment），亟需将CIR推向更贴近真实世界的复杂多修改场景。
AI.method: 1) 构建两个指令丰富的多修改数据集M-FashionIQ和M-CIRR；2) 提出TEMA（Text-oriented Entity Mapping Architecture），一种面向文本的实体映射架构，首次支持多修改场景同时兼容简单修改。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的大量实验证明，TEMA在原始设置和多修改场景下均表现优越，并在检索精度与计算效率之间达到了最优平衡。
AI.conclusion: TEMA有效解决了现有CIR方法在复杂多修改场景下的局限性，推动了CIR向更真实应用场景迈进了一步。

title: The Sample Complexity of Multicalibration
summary:
We study the minimax sample complexity of multicalibration in the batch setting. A learner observes $n$ i.i.d. samples from an unknown distribution and must output a (possibly randomized) predictor whose population multicalibration error, measured by Expected Calibration Error (ECE), is at most $\varepsilon$ with respect to a given family of groups. For every fixed $κ> 0$, in the regime $|G|\le \varepsilon^{-κ}$, we prove that $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-3})$ samples are necessary and sufficient, up to polylogarithmic factors. The lower bound holds even for randomized predictors, and the upper bound is realized by a randomized predictor obtained via an online-to-batch reduction. This separates the sample complexity of multicalibration from that of marginal calibration, which scales as $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-2})$, and shows that mean-ECE multicalibration is as difficult in the batch setting as it is in the online setting, in contrast to marginal calibration which is strictly more difficult in the online setting. In contrast we observe that for $κ= 0$, the sample complexity of multicalibration remains $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-2})$ exhibiting a sharp threshold phenomenon.
  More generally, we establish matching upper and lower bounds, up to polylogarithmic factors, for a weighted $L_p$ multicalibration metric for all $1 \le p \le 2$, with optimal exponent $3/p$. We also extend the lower-bound template to a regular class of elicitable properties, and combine it with the online upper bounds of Hu et al. (2025) to obtain matching bounds for calibrating properties including expectiles and bounded-density quantiles.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了批处理设置下多校准（multicalibration）的极小化样本复杂度。对于固定κ>0且|G|≤ε^{-κ}时，证明样本复杂度为Θ̃(ε^{-3})（上下界匹配），与边际校准的Θ̃(ε^{-2})不同。对于κ=0，复杂度降至Θ̃(ε^{-2})，呈现阈值现象。进一步推广到加权L_p多校准度量（1≤p≤2），最优指数为3/p，并扩展至可引发性质的校准。
AI.motivation: 多校准是机器学习公平性和可解释性中的重要概念，但其样本复杂度在批处理场景下尚未明确。本文旨在严格刻画多校准所需的样本量，填补理论空白，并理解其与边际校准、在线学习等的关系。
AI.method: 采用在线到批处理（online-to-batch）归约构造随机预测器实现上界；通过信息论下界技术（如Fano不等式、拟阵论）证明样本复杂度下界，特别分析了随机化预测器的不可回避性。针对κ=0和κ>0两种情形分别处理，并推广到L_p度量和可引发性质。
AI.result: 在|G|≤ε^{-κ}（κ>0）下，多校准的样本复杂度为Θ̃(ε^{-3})，与边际校准的Θ̃(ε^{-2})分离。κ=0时复杂度降为Θ̃(ε^{-2})。加权L_p多校准的最优样本复杂度指数为3/p（1≤p≤2）。下界模板适用于广义可引发性质的校准。
AI.conclusion: 批处理多校准的样本复杂度显著高于边际校准，且与在线多校准的复杂度一致，揭示了两者间的深刻差异。κ的阈值现象表明组族大小对复杂度有决定性影响。结果为理解校准类问题的统计难度提供了系统框架。

title: Multiscale Super Resolution without Image Priors
summary: We address the ambiguities in the super-resolution problem under translation. We demonstrate that combinations of low-resolution images at different scales can be used to make the super-resolution problem well posed. Such differences in scale can be achieved using sensors with different pixel sizes (as demonstrated here) or by varying the effective pixel size through changes in optical magnification (e.g., using a zoom lens). We show that images acquired with pairwise coprime pixel sizes lead to a system with a stable inverse, and furthermore, that super-resolution images can be reconstructed efficiently using Fourier domain techniques or iterative least squares methods. Our mathematical analysis provides an expression for the expected error of the least squares reconstruction for large signals assuming i.i.d. noise that elucidates the noise-resolution tradeoff. These results are validated through both one- and two-dimensional experiments that leverage charge-coupled device (CCD) hardware binning to explore reconstructions over a large range of effective pixel sizes. Finally, two-dimensional reconstructions for a series of targets are used to demonstrate the advantages of multiscale super-resolution, and implications of these results for common imaging systems are discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用不同分辨率（互质像素尺寸）的低分辨率图像组合来解决超分辨率问题中的平移模糊性，通过傅里叶域或迭代最小二乘法实现稳定重构，并给出了噪声-分辨率权衡的数学分析。
AI.motivation: 超分辨率问题在平移下存在多义性，现有方法难以保证解的稳定性，需要一种理论上可证明的、具有稳定逆变换的多尺度超分辨率方法。
AI.method: 使用互质像素尺寸的传感器采集不同尺度的低分辨率图像，构建具有稳定逆的系统；采用傅里叶域技术和迭代最小二乘法进行高效重构；通过CCD硬件合并实现多种有效像素尺寸的实验验证。
AI.result: 互质像素尺寸的图像组合使得超分辨率问题良定；给出了大信号下最小二乘重构期望误差的理论表达式；一维和二维实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度超分辨率方法具有理论保证和实际可行性，能够有效克服平移模糊性，在常见成像系统中具有应用潜力。

title: Fine-Tuning Regimes Define Distinct Continual Learning Problems
summary: Continual learning (CL) studies how models acquire tasks sequentially while retaining previously learned knowledge. Despite substantial progress in benchmarking CL methods, comparative evaluations typically keep the fine-tuning regime fixed. In this paper, we argue that the fine-tuning regime, defined by the trainable parameter subspace, is itself a key evaluation variable. We formalize adaptation regimes as projected optimization over fixed trainable subspaces, showing that changing the trainable depth alters the effective update signal through which both current task fitting and knowledge preservation operate. This analysis motivates the hypothesis that method comparisons need not be invariant across regimes. We test this hypothesis in task incremental CL, five trainable depth regimes, and four standard methods: online EWC, LwF, SI, and GEM. Across five benchmark datasets, namely MNIST, Fashion MNIST, KMNIST, QMNIST, and CIFAR-100, and across 11 task orders per dataset, we find that the relative ranking of methods is not consistently preserved across regimes. We further show that deeper adaptation regimes are associated with larger update magnitudes, higher forgetting, and a stronger relationship between the two. These results show that comparative conclusions in CL can depend strongly on the chosen fine-tuning regime, motivating regime-aware evaluation protocols that treat trainable depth as an explicit experimental factor.

AI.tldr: 本文提出微调机制（即可训练参数子空间）本身是持续学习评估的关键变量。通过形式化投影优化框架，发现改变可训练深度会改变更新信号，从而影响任务拟合与知识保留。实验表明，方法排名在不同微调机制下不一致，且越深的机制导致越大的更新幅度、更高的遗忘率以及两者间更强的关联。建议将可训练深度作为显式实验因素纳入评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习评估通常固定微调机制，但本文认为微调机制（可训练参数子空间）本身就是关键变量，不同机制下方法的相对表现可能不一致。
AI.method: 将适应机制形式化为固定可训练子空间上的投影优化；在任务增量学习下，设置五种可训练深度机制，评估四种标准方法（在线EWC、LwF、SI、GEM）在五个基准数据集及11种任务顺序上的表现。
AI.result: 方法相对排名在不同微调机制下不一致；更深的适应机制导致更大的更新幅度、更高的遗忘率及两者间更强的关联。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习中的比较结论可能强烈依赖于所选的微调机制，建议采用机制感知的评估协议，将可训练深度作为显式实验因素。

title: Divide-then-Diagnose: Weaving Clinician-Inspired Contexts for Ultra-Long Capsule Endoscopy Videos
summary: Capsule endoscopy (CE) enables non-invasive gastrointestinal screening, but current CE research remains largely limited to frame-level classification and detection, leaving video-level analysis underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce and formally define a new task, diagnosis-driven CE video summarization, which requires extracting key evidence frames that covers clinically meaningful findings and making accurate diagnoses from those evidence frames. This setting is challenging because diagnostically relevant events are extremely sparse and can be overwhelmed by tens of thousands of redundant normal frames, while individual observations are often ambiguous due to motion blur, debris, specular highlights, and rapid viewpoint changes. To facilitate research in this direction, we introduce VideoCAP, the first CE dataset with diagnosis-driven annotations derived from real clinical reports. VideoCAP comprises 240 full-length videos and provides realistic supervision for both key evidence frame extraction and diagnosis. To address this task, we further propose DiCE, a clinician-inspired framework that mirrors the standard CE reading workflow. DiCE first performs efficient candidate screening over the raw video, then uses a Context Weaver to organize candidates into coherent diagnostic contexts that preserve distinct lesion events, and an Evidence Converger to aggregate multi-frame evidence within each context into robust clip-level judgments. Experiments show that DiCE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, producing concise and clinically reliable diagnostic summaries. These results highlight diagnosis-driven contextual reasoning as a promising paradigm for ultra-long CE video summarization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出诊断驱动的胶囊内镜视频摘要新任务，构建首个含真实临床报告的CE数据集VideoCAP，并设计临床医生启发式框架DiCE，通过候选帧筛选、上下文组织和证据聚合生成简洁可靠的诊断摘要，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前胶囊内镜研究局限于帧级分类与检测，缺乏视频级分析；诊断相关事件极其稀疏（被数万正常帧淹没），且单个帧因运动模糊、碎片等存在歧义，亟待一种能从长视频中提取关键证据帧并作出准确诊断的方法。
AI.method: 提出DiCE框架：(1) 候选筛选模块高效过滤冗余正常帧；(2) Context Weaver将候选帧组织为保留不同病变事件的连贯诊断上下文；(3) Evidence Converger在每个上下文内聚合多帧证据，形成稳健的片段级判断。
AI.result: 在VideoCAP数据集上，DiCE在关键帧提取和诊断准确性上均一致优于现有最先进方法，生成的摘要简洁且临床可靠。
AI.conclusion: 诊断驱动的上下文推理是超长胶囊内镜视频摘要的一个有前景的新范式，值得进一步探索。

title: Temporal Taskification in Streaming Continual Learning: A Source of Evaluation Instability
summary: Streaming Continual Learning (CL) typically converts a continuous stream into a sequence of discrete tasks through temporal partitioning. We argue that this temporal taskification step is not a neutral preprocessing choice, but a structural component of evaluation: different valid splits of the same stream can induce different CL regimes and therefore different benchmark conclusions. To study this effect, we introduce a taskification-level framework based on plasticity and stability profiles, a profile distance between taskifications, and Boundary-Profile Sensitivity (BPS), which diagnoses how strongly small boundary perturbations alter the induced regime before any CL model is trained. We evaluate continual finetuning, Experience Replay, Elastic Weight Consolidation, and Learning without Forgetting on network traffic forecasting with CESNET-Timeseries24, keeping the stream, model, and training budget fixed while varying only the temporal taskification. Across 9-, 30-, and 44-day splits, we observe substantial changes in forecasting error, forgetting, and backward transfer, showing that taskification alone can materially affect CL evaluation. We further find that shorter taskifications induce noisier distribution-level patterns, larger structural distances, and higher BPS, indicating greater sensitivity to boundary perturbations. These results show that benchmark conclusions in streaming CL depend not only on the learner and the data stream, but also on how that stream is taskified, motivating temporal taskification as a first-class evaluation variable.

AI.tldr: 本文发现流式持续学习中的时间任务划分（taskification）并非中性预处理，而是评估的结构性组成部分：同一数据流的不同划分方式会改变CL机制和基准结论。作者提出基于可塑性与稳定性轮廓的框架、轮廓距离和边界-轮廓敏感性（BPS）来诊断这一效应，并通过网络流量预测实验证明任务划分本身就能显著影响评估结果。
AI.motivation: 揭示流式持续学习中时间任务划分（taskification）这一看似中性的预处理步骤实际上对评估结论有结构性影响，从而呼吁将其视为一等评估变量。
AI.method: 1) 提出基于可塑性与稳定性轮廓（plasticity and stability profiles）的任务划分层次框架；2) 定义轮廓距离（profile distance）用于衡量不同任务划分之间的差异；3) 提出边界-轮廓敏感性（BPS）诊断方法，在训练任何CL模型之前评估边界扰动对任务划分所诱导的CL机制的影响；4) 在CESNET-Timeseries24网络流量预测数据集上，固定数据流、模型和训练预算，仅改变时间任务划分（9天、30天、44天），对比持续微调、经验重放、EWC和LwF四种CL方法。
AI.result: 1) 不同的时间任务划分导致预测误差、遗忘和反向迁移发生显著变化；2) 较短的任务划分会引发更嘈杂的分布级模式、更大的结构距离和更高的BPS，即对边界扰动更敏感；3) 任务划分本身就能实质性地影响CL评估结论。
AI.conclusion: 流式持续学习的基准结论不仅取决于学习器和数据流，还取决于数据流如何被任务化，应将时间任务化（temporal taskification）作为第一类评估变量予以重视。

title: Grounding Video Reasoning in Physical Signals
comment: Benchmark for Grounding Video Reasoning in Physical Signals
summary: Physical video understanding requires more than naming an event correctly. A model can answer a question about pouring, sliding, or collision from textual regularities while still failing to localize the event in time or space. We introduce a grounded benchmark for physical video understanding that extends the what--when--where evaluation structure of V-STaR to four video sources, six physics domains, three prompt families (physics, vstar_like, and neutral_rstr), and four input conditions (original, shuffled, ablated, and frame-masked). The benchmark contains 1,560 base video clips from SSV2, YouCook2, HoloAssist, and Roundabout-TAU. Each clip is first converted into a shared grounded event record, and the three query families are derived from that record. Temporal and spatial targets are shared across prompt families, while the non-physics families use deterministic family-appropriate semantic a_what targets derived from the same record. Across models and prompt families, physics remains the strongest regime overall, vstar_like is the clearest non-physics semantic comparison, and neutral_rstr behaves as a harder templated control. Prompt-family robustness is selective rather than universal, perturbation gains cluster in weak original cases, and spatial grounding is the weakest across settings. These results suggest that video Q&A reasoning benchmarks shall report physically grounded, prompt-aware, and perturbation-aware diagnostics alongside aggregate accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于物理视频理解的基准测试，扩展了V-STaR的"什么-何时-何处"评估框架，涵盖4种视频源、6个物理领域、3种提示类型和4种输入条件，共1,560个视频片段。研究发现：物理提示表现最强，空间定位是最薄弱的环节，提示鲁棒性具有选择性而非普遍性。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频问答模型可能通过文本规律正确回答物理事件（如倾倒、滑动、碰撞），但无法在时间或空间上准确定位事件。需要建立一个真正基于物理理解而非文本记忆的评估基准。
AI.method: 将V-STaR的"什么-何时-何处"评估框架扩展到4种视频源（SSV2、YouCook2、HoloAssist、Roundabout-TAU）、6个物理领域、3种提示类型（physics、vstar_like、neutral_rstr）和4种输入条件（原始、打乱、消融、帧遮罩），共构建1,560个基础视频片段，每个片段转换为共享的接地事件记录。
AI.result: 物理提示在所有模型和提示类型中表现最强；vstar_like是非物理语义比较中最清晰的基线；neutral_rstr作为更难的控制模板。提示鲁棒性具有选择性而非普遍性，扰动增益集中在弱原始案例上，空间定位是各个设置中最薄弱的环节。
AI.conclusion: 视频问答推理基准应在总体准确率之外，报告物理接地、提示感知和扰动感知的诊断指标。

title: Addressing Image Authenticity When Cameras Use Generative AI
comment: To appear in CVPR 2026 Workshop on Authenticity and Provenance in the Age of Generative AI
summary: The ability of generative AI (GenAI) methods to photorealistically alter camera images has raised awareness about the authenticity of images shared online. Interestingly, images captured directly by our cameras are considered authentic and faithful. However, with the increasing integration of deep-learning modules into cameras' capture-time hardware -- namely, the image signal processor (ISP) -- there is now a potential for hallucinated content in images directly output by our cameras. Hallucinated capture-time image content is typically benign, such as enhanced edges or texture, but in certain operations, such as AI-based digital zoom or low-light image enhancement, hallucinations can potentially alter the semantics and interpretation of the image content. As a result, users may not realize that the content in their camera images is not authentic. This paper addresses this issue by enabling users to recover the 'unhallucinated' version of the camera image to avoid misinterpretation of the image content. Our approach works by optimizing an image-specific multi-layer perceptron (MLP) decoder together with a modality-specific encoder so that, given the camera image, we can recover the image before hallucinated content was added. The encoder and MLP are self-contained and can be applied post-capture to the image without requiring access to the camera ISP. Moreover, the encoder and MLP decoder require only 180 KB of storage and can be readily saved as metadata within standard image formats such as JPEG and HEIC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，允许用户从相机直接输出的图像中恢复“未幻觉”版本，避免因AI ISP模块引入的幻觉内容导致图像语义误解。方法通过优化图像专用的MLP解码器和模态编码器实现，仅需180KB元数据即可嵌入标准图像格式。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模块（AI ISP）集成到相机硬件中，相机直出图像可能包含幻觉内容（如AI变焦、低光增强），这些内容可能改变图像语义，导致用户误以为图像内容完全真实。现有方法无法在拍摄后去除这些幻觉。
AI.method: 针对每张图像，联合优化一个图像专用的多层感知机（MLP）解码器和一个模态编码器。给定相机输出图像，编码器-解码器结构可恢复出幻觉添加前的原始图像。该模型仅需180KB，可存储为JPEG/HEIC元数据，无需访问相机ISP。
AI.result: 提出的方法能在拍摄后有效去除AI ISP引入的幻觉内容，恢复更真实的图像版本。模型轻量高效（180KB），可直接嵌入标准图像格式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了AI ISP可能破坏相机图像真实性的问题，并提供了实用的后处理解决方案，为图像取证和数字内容信任提供了新思路。

title: UniGenDet: A Unified Generative-Discriminative Framework for Co-Evolutionary Image Generation and Generated Image Detection
summary: In recent years, significant progress has been made in both image generation and generated image detection. Despite their rapid, yet largely independent, development, these two fields have evolved distinct architectural paradigms: the former predominantly relies on generative networks, while the latter favors discriminative frameworks. A recent trend in both domains is the use of adversarial information to enhance performance, revealing potential for synergy. However, the significant architectural divergence between them presents considerable challenges. Departing from previous approaches, we propose UniGenDet: a Unified generative-discriminative framework for co-evolutionary image Generation and generated image Detection. To bridge the task gap, we design a symbiotic multimodal self-attention mechanism and a unified fine-tuning algorithm. This synergy allows the generation task to improve the interpretability of authenticity identification, while authenticity criteria guide the creation of higher-fidelity images. Furthermore, we introduce a detector-informed generative alignment mechanism to facilitate seamless information exchange. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code: \href{https://github.com/Zhangyr2022/UniGenDet}{https://github.com/Zhangyr2022/UniGenDet}.

AI.tldr: 提出UniGenDet统一生成-判别框架，通过共生多模态自注意力机制和统一微调算法，实现图像生成与生成图像检测的协同进化，在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 图像生成与生成图像检测领域各自独立发展，架构差异大（生成网络 vs 判别框架），但都使用对抗信息提升性能，存在协同潜力。作者希望弥合架构鸿沟，实现两个任务的互利共生。
AI.method: 1) 提出UniGenDet统一生成-判别框架；2) 设计共生多模态自注意力机制（Symbiotic Multimodal Self-Attention）和统一微调算法；3) 引入检测器引导的生成对齐机制（Detector-Informed Generative Alignment），促进信息无缝交换。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到state-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: 生成任务可提升真伪鉴别的可解释性，真伪判别标准可指导更高保真度图像的生成，两个任务通过统一框架实现协同进化。

title: Directional Confusions Reveal Divergent Inductive Biases Through Rate-Distortion Geometry in Human and Machine Vision
summary: Humans and modern vision models can reach similar classification accuracy while making systematically different kinds of mistakes - differing not in how often they err, but in who gets mistaken for whom, and in which direction. We show that these directional confusions reveal distinct inductive biases that are invisible to accuracy alone. Using matched human and deep vision model responses on a natural-image categorization task under 12 perturbation types, we quantify asymmetry in confusion matrices and link it to generalization geometry through a Rate-Distortion (RD) framework, summarized by three geometric signatures (slope (beta), curvature (kappa)) and efficiency (AUC). We find that humans exhibit broad but weak asymmetries, whereas deep vision models show sparser, stronger directional collapses. Robustness training reduces global asymmetry but fails to recover the human-like breadth-strength profile of graded similarity. Mechanistic simulations further show that different asymmetry organizations shift the RD frontier in opposite directions, even when matched for performance. Together, these results position directional confusions and RD geometry as compact, interpretable signatures of inductive bias under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 人类与深度视觉模型在分类准确率上相当，但在错误方向（谁被误认成谁）上存在系统性差异。本文通过混淆矩阵不对称性分析与率失真（RD）几何框架，揭示了两种智能体不同的归纳偏置特征：人类具有广泛而微弱的不对称性，而深度模型则表现出稀疏而强烈的方向性崩溃。
AI.motivation: 传统分类准确率无法揭示模型与人类在错误模式上的本质差异，即"谁被误认为谁"的方向性混淆。本文旨在量化这些方向性混淆，并建立其与归纳偏置和泛化几何之间的联系。
AI.method: 在12种扰动类型下的自然图像分类任务中，收集人类与深度视觉模型的配对响应数据；量化混淆矩阵的不对称性；通过率失真（RD）框架提取三种几何签名（斜率β、曲率κ和效率AUC）；进行鲁棒性训练对比与机制性仿真实验。
AI.result: 人类表现出广泛但微弱的不对称性；深度视觉模型表现出稀疏但强烈的方向性崩溃；鲁棒性训练能降低全局不对称性，但无法恢复人类式的广度-强度渐变相似性曲线；不同不对称性组织方式即使性能匹配，也会使RD前沿向相反方向移动。
AI.conclusion: 方向性混淆与率失真几何可作为分布偏移下归纳偏置的紧凑、可解释的签名，为理解人机智能差异提供了新的定量视角。

title: When Prompts Override Vision: Prompt-Induced Hallucinations in LVLMs
summary: Despite impressive progress in capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs), these systems remain vulnerable to hallucinations, i.e., outputs that are not grounded in the visual input. Prior work has attributed hallucinations in LVLMs to factors such as limitations of the vision backbone or the dominance of the language component, yet the relative importance of these factors remains unclear. To resolve this ambiguity, We propose HalluScope, a benchmark to better understand the extent to which different factors induce hallucinations. Our analysis indicates that hallucinations largely stem from excessive reliance on textual priors and background knowledge, especially information introduced through textual instructions. To mitigate hallucinations induced by textual instruction priors, we propose HalluVL-DPO, a framework for fine-tuning off-the-shelf LVLMs towards more visually grounded responses. HalluVL-DPO leverages preference optimization using a curated training dataset that we construct, guiding the model to prefer grounded responses over hallucinated ones. We demonstrate that our optimized model effectively mitigates the targeted hallucination failure mode, while preserving or improving performance on other hallucination benchmarks and visual capability evaluations. To support reproducibility and further research, we will publicly release our evaluation benchmark, preference training dataset, and code at https://pegah-kh.github.io/projects/prompts-override-vision/ .

AI.tldr: 本文提出HalluScope基准，发现LVLM幻觉主要源于文本先验和背景知识的过度依赖（尤其是文本指令）；并提出HalluVL-DPO框架，通过偏好优化微调模型以产生更符合视觉的响应，有效缓解了目标幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: LVLMs虽然能力提升迅速，但存在幻觉问题（输出与视觉输入不符）。先前研究将幻觉归因于视觉骨干限制或语言组件主导，但各因素的相对重要性尚不明确，因此需要系统性分析。
AI.method: 提出HalluScope基准分析幻觉来源；构建HalluVL-DPO框架，利用偏好优化和人工构造的训练数据集，微调现成LVLM以鼓励模型偏好基于视觉的响应而非幻觉响应。
AI.result: 优化后的模型有效缓解了由文本指令先验引发的幻觉，同时在其它幻觉基准和视觉能力评估上保持或提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉主要源于对文本先验和背景知识的过度依赖；通过针对性的偏好优化可以缓解这一问题，且不影响模型在其他任务上的表现。

title: Vista4D: Video Reshooting with 4D Point Clouds
comment: 24 pages, 20 figures, CVPR 2026, see project page at https://eyeline-labs.github.io/Vista4D
summary: We present Vista4D, a robust and flexible video reshooting framework that grounds the input video and target cameras in a 4D point cloud. Specifically, given an input video, our method re-synthesizes the scene with the same dynamics from a different camera trajectory and viewpoint. Existing video reshooting methods often struggle with depth estimation artifacts of real-world dynamic videos, while also failing to preserve content appearance and failing to maintain precise camera control for challenging new trajectories. We build a 4D-grounded point cloud representation with static pixel segmentation and 4D reconstruction to explicitly preserve seen content and provide rich camera signals, and we train with reconstructed multiview dynamic data for robustness against point cloud artifacts during real-world inference. Our results demonstrate improved 4D consistency, camera control, and visual quality compared to state-of-the-art baselines under a variety of videos and camera paths. Moreover, our method generalizes to real-world applications such as dynamic scene expansion and 4D scene recomposition. See our project page for results, code, and models: https://eyeline-labs.github.io/Vista4D

AI.tldr: Vista4D提出了一个基于4D点云的视频重拍摄框架，通过静态像素分割和4D重建显式保留场景内容，在不同摄像机轨迹下实现鲁棒的动态场景重合成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频重拍摄方法在处理真实世界动态视频时存在深度估计伪影、内容外观保留不足以及对新相机轨迹控制不精准的问题。
AI.method: 构建4D点云表示，结合静态像素分割和4D重建显式保留已见内容；利用重建的多视图动态数据进行训练以增强对点云伪影的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多种视频和相机路径下，相比现有方法在4D一致性、相机控制和视觉质量上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: Vista4D不仅提升了重拍摄质量，还能泛化到动态场景扩展和4D场景重组等实际应用。

title: Context Unrolling in Omni Models
summary: We present Omni, a unified multimodal model natively trained on diverse modalities, including text, images, videos, 3D geometry, and hidden representations. We find that such training enables Context Unrolling, where the model explicitly reasons across multiple modal representations before producing predictions. This process enables the model to aggregate complementary information across heterogeneous modalities, facilitating a more faithful approximation of the shared multimodal knowledge manifold and improving downstream reasoning fidelity. As a result, Omni achieves strong performance on both multimodal generation and understanding benchmarks, while demonstrating advanced multimodal reasoning capabilities, including in-context generation of text, image, video, and 3D geometry.

AI.tldr: Omni是一个统一多模态模型，原生训练于文本、图像、视频、3D几何和隐藏表示等多种模态。其"上下文展开"机制让模型在多模态表示间显式推理，聚合互补信息，提升多模态生成和理解能力，并支持文本、图像、视频和3D的上下文生成。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通常针对单一或少数模态设计，缺乏跨模态的联合推理能力。作者希望构建一个原生统一的多模态模型，使其能够在多种模态之间进行显式推理，从而更忠实地逼近共享的多模态知识流形。
AI.method: 提出Omni模型，直接在文本、图像、视频、3D几何和隐藏表示等多种模态上进行原生统一训练。关键在于"Context Unrolling"机制，模型在生成预测前会跨多个模态表示进行显式推理，聚合异构模态中的互补信息。
AI.result: Omni在多项多模态生成和理解基准上取得了强劲性能，展示了高级的多模态推理能力，包括文本、图像、视频和3D几何的上下文生成。
AI.conclusion: 原生多模态训练结合上下文展开机制能有效提升模型对共享多模态知识流形的逼近能力，增强下游推理的忠实度，证明了统一多模态建模的可行性。

title: Seeing Without Eyes: 4D Human-Scene Understanding from Wearable IMUs
summary: Understanding human activities and their surrounding environments typically relies on visual perception, yet cameras pose persistent challenges in privacy, safety, energy efficiency, and scalability. We explore an alternative: 4D perception without vision. Its goal is to reconstruct human motion and 3D scene layouts purely from everyday wearable sensors. For this we introduce IMU-to-4D, a framework that repurposes large language models for non-visual spatiotemporal understanding of human-scene dynamics. IMU-to-4D uses data from a few inertial sensors from earbuds, watches, or smartphones and predicts detailed 4D human motion together with coarse scene structure. Experiments across diverse human-scene datasets show that IMU-to-4D yields more coherent and temporally stable results than SoTA cascaded pipelines, suggesting wearable motion sensors alone can support rich 4D understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMU-to-4D框架，利用可穿戴惯性传感器（如耳机、手表、手机中的IMU）重建人体运动与3D场景布局，无需视觉感知，并借助大语言模型实现非视觉的时空理解。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉感知在隐私、安全、能耗和可扩展性方面存在局限，因此探索仅利用可穿戴传感器进行4D感知（人体运动+场景结构）的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出IMU-to-4D框架，利用耳塞、手表或智能手机中的少量惯性传感器数据，结合大语言模型进行非视觉的时空理解，预测详细的4D人体运动与粗略场景结构。
AI.result: 在多样的人体-场景数据集上，IMU-to-4D比现有级联管道产生更连贯、时间上更稳定的结果。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠可穿戴运动传感器就能支持丰富的4D理解，为无视觉感知的人体-场景动态理解提供了可行方案。

title: Seeing Fast and Slow: Learning the Flow of Time in Videos
summary: How can we tell whether a video has been sped up or slowed down? How can we generate videos at different speeds? Although videos have been central to modern computer vision research, little attention has been paid to perceiving and controlling the passage of time. In this paper, we study time as a learnable visual concept and develop models for reasoning about and manipulating the flow of time in videos. We first exploit the multimodal cues and temporal structure naturally present in videos to learn, in a self-supervised manner, to detect speed changes and estimate playback speed. We then show that these learned temporal reasoning models enable us to curate the largest slow-motion video dataset to date from noisy in-the-wild sources. Such slow-motion footage, typically filmed by high-speed cameras, contains substantially richer temporal detail than standard videos. Using this data, we further develop models capable of temporal control, including speed-conditioned video generation, which produces motion at specified playback speed, and temporal super-resolution, which tranforms low-FPS, blurry videos into high-FPS sequences with fine-grained temporal details. Our findings highlight time as a manipulable, perceptual dimension in video learning, opening doors to temporally controllable video generation, temporal forensics detection, and potentially richer world-models that understand how events unfold over time.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视频中时间作为可学习视觉概念，通过自监督方式学习检测速度变化和估计播放速度，进而构建大规模慢动作视频数据集，并开发速度可控的视频生成和时间超分辨率模型。
AI.motivation: 视频中的时间流逝感知和控制长期被忽视，现有研究缺乏对视频时间维度的系统性建模与操控能力。
AI.method: 1) 利用视频中的多模态线索和时间结构，以自监督方式学习速度变化检测和播放速度估计；2) 利用学习到的时序推理模型从嘈杂的互联网视频中构建大规模慢动作数据集；3) 基于该数据集开发速度条件视频生成和时间超分辨率模型。
AI.result: 构建了迄今为止最大规模的慢动作视频数据集，实现了速度可控的视频生成（产生指定播放速度的运动）和时间超分辨率（将低帧率模糊视频转换为高帧率精细时序细节视频）。
AI.conclusion: 时间是一个可操作、可感知的视频学习维度，为时序可控视频生成、时序取证检测及更丰富的世界模型理解事件演化打开了新方向。
